01-01.body_en: God's mercies are new every morning, and today they are new for you. Whatever last year held, step into this one trusting His unfailing faithfulness.
01-01.body_sw: Rehema za Mungu ni mpya kila asubuhi, na leo ni mpya kwa ajili yako. Chochote kilichokuwepo mwaka jana, ingia katika mwaka huu ukitumaini uaminifu wake usiokoma.

01-02.body_en: God specializes in doing new things — rivers in deserts, roads in wilderness. Invite Him to open a fresh path in your life this year.
01-02.body_sw: Mungu ni hodari wa kufanya mambo mapya — mito jangwani, njia nyikani. Mkaribishe afungue njia mpya katika maisha yako mwaka huu.

01-03.body_en: Committing your way to the Lord means handing Him the map and the steering wheel. Trust Him with your plans today and He will act.
01-03.body_sw: Kumkabidhi Bwana njia yako ni kumpa ramani na usukani. Mwamini kwa mipango yako leo naye atatenda.

01-04.body_en: Your own understanding is a narrow lamp; God's wisdom lights the whole road. Acknowledge Him in every decision and He will straighten your paths.
01-04.body_sw: Ufahamu wako mwenyewe ni taa finyu; hekima ya Mungu huangaza njia yote. Mkiri katika kila uamuzi naye atanyoosha mapito yako.

01-05.body_en: Paul refused to be chained to his past — he pressed toward the prize ahead. Leave yesterday's failures behind and run today's race.
01-05.body_sw: Paulo alikataa kufungwa na maisha yake ya nyuma — alikaza mwendo kuelekea tuzo iliyo mbele. Acha nyuma kushindwa kwa jana na ukimbie mbio za leo.

01-06.body_en: God's command to Joshua is His promise to you: be strong, for He goes with you. No new territory is too frightening when the Lord walks ahead.
01-06.body_sw: Amri ya Mungu kwa Yoshua ni ahadi yake kwako: uwe hodari, kwa maana yeye yu pamoja nawe. Hakuna nchi mpya ya kutisha Bwana anapotangulia mbele.

01-07.body_en: God promises to instruct you and watch over your way with His own eye. You do not need the whole plan — only the next step He shows.
01-07.body_sw: Mungu anaahidi kukufundisha na kukulinda njiani kwa jicho lake mwenyewe. Huhitaji mpango wote — bali hatua moja tu anayokuonyesha.

01-08.body_en: In Christ the old has passed away and everything becomes new. Let Him renew not just your resolutions but your heart.
01-08.body_sw: Katika Kristo mambo ya kale yamepita na yote yanakuwa mapya. Mwache afanye upya si maazimio yako tu bali moyo wako.

01-09.body_en: Moses prayed for wisdom to treasure each day as a gift. Ask God to teach you to spend today on what matters forever.
01-09.body_sw: Musa aliomba hekima ya kuthamini kila siku kama zawadi. Mwombe Mungu akufundishe kutumia leo kwa mambo ya milele.

01-10.body_en: God does not merely wish you well — He holds you with His righteous right hand. Face this day unafraid, for He is your God.
01-10.body_sw: Mungu hakutakii mema tu — anakushika kwa mkono wake wa kuume wa haki. Ikabili siku hii bila hofu, kwa maana yeye ni Mungu wako.

01-11.body_en: Jesus promises that when His kingdom comes first, everything else falls into place. Put God at the top of today's list and watch Him provide.
01-11.body_sw: Yesu anaahidi kwamba ufalme wake ukitangulia, mengine yote hupangika. Mweke Mungu juu ya orodha ya leo na utazame akikuruzuku.

01-12.body_en: Scripture rarely floodlights the whole journey; it is a lamp for the next step. Read His Word today and walk as far as its light shines.
01-12.body_sw: Mara chache Maandiko huangaza safari yote; ni taa ya hatua inayofuata. Soma Neno lake leo na utembee kadiri nuru yake inavyoangaza.

01-13.body_en: God's thoughts toward you are of peace, to give you a future and a hope. Whatever this year brings, His intentions for you are good.
01-13.body_sw: Mawazo ya Mungu kwako ni ya amani, kukupa tumaini siku zako za mwisho. Chochote kitakacholetwa na mwaka huu, makusudi yake kwako ni mema.

01-14.body_en: David asked to hear God's lovingkindness in the morning, before the day's noise began. Give God the first word in your day, every day.
01-14.body_sw: Daudi aliomba kusikia fadhili za Mungu asubuhi, kabla ya kelele za siku kuanza. Mpe Mungu neno la kwanza katika siku yako, kila siku.

01-15.body_en: Whatever your hands find to do today, do it heartily, as for the Lord. Ordinary tasks become sacred when done for Him.
01-15.body_sw: Lolote mikono yako itakalofanya leo, lifanye kwa moyo, kama kwa Bwana. Kazi za kawaida huwa takatifu zinapofanywa kwa ajili yake.

01-16.body_en: In a hurried world, stillness is an act of faith. Pause today and remember: He is God, and you are not alone.
01-16.body_sw: Katika ulimwengu wa haraka, kutulia ni tendo la imani. Tua leo na ukumbuke: yeye ndiye Mungu, nawe hauko peke yako.

01-17.body_en: God's requirements are beautifully simple: do justly, love mercy, walk humbly with Him. Let these three shape every choice you make today.
01-17.body_sw: Matakwa ya Mungu ni rahisi na mazuri: kutenda haki, kupenda rehema, kwenda kwa unyenyekevu na Mungu wako. Acha mambo haya matatu yaunde kila uamuzi wako leo.

01-18.body_en: Waiting is not wasted time when you wait on God. He strengthens the heart that refuses to run ahead of Him.
01-18.body_sw: Kungoja si kupoteza muda unapomngoja Mungu. Yeye hutia nguvu moyo unaokataa kumtangulia.

01-19.body_en: Those who wait upon the Lord exchange their weakness for His strength. Rise today on wings He supplies, and run without fainting.
01-19.body_sw: Wamngojao Bwana hubadilisha udhaifu wao kwa nguvu zake. Paa leo kwa mbawa anazotoa, na ukimbie bila kuzimia.

01-20.body_en: Jesus invites persistent prayer: keep asking, keep seeking, keep knocking. The door is not locked to the child who keeps coming to the Father.
01-20.body_sw: Yesu anakaribisha maombi ya kudumu: endelea kuomba, kutafuta, kubisha. Mlango haujafungwa kwa mtoto anayeendelea kumjia Baba.

01-21.body_en: The person who delights in God's Word is like a tree by rivers of water — fruitful and unwithering. Sink your roots into Scripture today.
01-21.body_sw: Mtu anayefurahia Neno la Mungu ni kama mti uliopandwa kando ya vijito vya maji — wenye matunda usionyauka. Zamisha mizizi yako katika Maandiko leo.

01-22.body_en: God gives wisdom generously and without scolding to all who ask. Facing a decision? Ask Him first, not last.
01-22.body_sw: Mungu hutoa hekima kwa ukarimu bila kulaumu kwa wote waombao. Unakabili uamuzi? Muulize yeye kwanza, si mwisho.

01-23.body_en: In God's presence is fullness of joy — not a trickle, but fullness. The path of life is walked one day at a time with Him.
01-23.body_sw: Mbele za Mungu kuna utimilifu wa furaha — si kidogo, bali utimilifu. Njia ya uzima huendwa siku moja baada ya nyingine pamoja naye.

01-24.body_en: The Lord Himself goes before you into every room, every meeting, every trial. You never arrive anywhere He has not already been.
01-24.body_sw: Bwana mwenyewe hukutangulia katika kila chumba, kila mkutano, kila jaribu. Hufiki mahali popote ambapo yeye hajafika kwanza.

01-25.body_en: Today is not an accident; it is a day the Lord has made. Choose to rejoice in it, whatever the forecast says.
01-25.body_sw: Leo si bahati mbaya; ni siku aliyoifanya Bwana. Chagua kuifurahia, hali ya hewa iweje.

01-26.body_en: Commit your works to the Lord and your thoughts will be established. Surrendered plans find a stability that self-made ones never do.
01-26.body_sw: Mkabidhi Bwana kazi zako na mawazo yako yatathibitika. Mipango iliyosalimishwa hupata uthabiti ambao mipango ya kujitegemea haipati kamwe.

01-27.body_en: God keeps in perfect peace the mind stayed on Him. Anxiety loses its grip when trust takes hold.
01-27.body_sw: Mungu humlinda katika amani kamilifu yeye ambaye moyo wake umemtegemea. Wasiwasi hupoteza nguvu pale imani inaposhika.

01-28.body_en: Your help does not come from the hills but from the One who made them. Lift your eyes higher than your problems today.
01-28.body_sw: Msaada wako hautoki milimani bali kwa yule aliyeiumba. Inua macho yako juu zaidi ya matatizo yako leo.

01-29.body_en: The harvest is promised to those who do not give up. Keep doing good today — the reaping season is coming.
01-29.body_sw: Mavuno yameahidiwa kwa wale wasiokata tamaa. Endelea kutenda mema leo — majira ya kuvuna yanakuja.

01-30.body_en: David's bravest prayer was an open invitation for God to inspect his heart. Pray it today and let the Spirit lead you in the everlasting way.
01-30.body_sw: Ombi la ujasiri zaidi la Daudi lilikuwa mwaliko wa wazi kwa Mungu kuuchunguza moyo wake. Liombe leo na umwache Roho akuongoze katika njia ya milele.

01-31.body_en: This ancient blessing is God's heart for His people: keeping, shining, peace. Receive it today and pass it on to someone else.
01-31.body_sw: Baraka hii ya kale ni moyo wa Mungu kwa watu wake: kulindwa, kuangaziwa, amani. Ipokee leo na umpelekee mtu mwingine.

02-01.body_en: The gospel in one verse: God loved, God gave, we live. Begin this month resting in the love that gave everything for you.
02-01.body_sw: Injili katika mstari mmoja: Mungu alipenda, Mungu alitoa, tunaishi. Anza mwezi huu ukipumzika katika upendo uliotoa kila kitu kwa ajili yako.

02-02.body_en: Our love is always a response — He loved us first. Every act of kindness you give today is an echo of His initiative.
02-02.body_sw: Upendo wetu daima ni mwitikio — yeye alitupenda kwanza. Kila tendo la wema utakalotoa leo ni mwangwi wa hatua yake ya kwanza.

02-03.body_en: God did not wait for us to improve before loving us; Christ died while we were still sinners. His love is proven, not promised only.
02-03.body_sw: Mungu hakusubiri tubadilike kabla ya kutupenda; Kristo alikufa tulipokuwa tungali wenye dhambi. Upendo wake umethibitishwa, si ahadi tu.

02-04.body_en: God's love for you did not begin at your birth and will not end at your failures — it is everlasting. He draws you with lovingkindness today.
02-04.body_sw: Upendo wa Mungu kwako haukuanza ulipozaliwa wala hautaisha kwa makosa yako — ni wa milele. Anakuvuta kwa fadhili leo.

02-05.body_en: The Mighty One does not merely tolerate you — He rejoices over you with singing. Let that thought silence every voice of shame today.
02-05.body_sw: Mwenye Nguvu hakuvumilii tu — anakufurahia kwa kuimba. Acha wazo hilo linyamazishe kila sauti ya aibu leo.

02-06.body_en: Love is patient and kind, keeping no record of wrongs. Read this passage as a mirror today, not a poem.
02-06.body_sw: Upendo huvumilia na kufadhili, haushiki hasira wala kuhesabu mabaya. Soma fungu hili leo kama kioo, si shairi.

02-07.title_en: As Far as East from West
02-07.body_en: God's mercy is as high as the heavens, and He removes our sins as far as east is from west. Stop carrying what God has already thrown away.
02-07.body_sw: Rehema ya Mungu ni kuu kama mbingu zilivyo juu, naye huyaondoa makosa yetu kama mashariki ilivyo mbali na magharibi. Acha kubeba kile ambacho Mungu amekwisha kutupa mbali.

02-08.body_en: The greatest love lays down its life for its friends — and Jesus called you friend. The cross is the measure of your worth to Him.
02-08.body_sw: Upendo mkuu zaidi hutoa uhai wake kwa ajili ya rafiki zake — na Yesu alikuita rafiki. Msalaba ndio kipimo cha thamani yako kwake.

02-09.body_en: Paul prayed we would grasp the width, length, depth, and height of Christ's love. It is a love too large to measure but not too far to experience.
02-09.body_sw: Paulo aliomba tufahamu upana, urefu, kimo na kina cha upendo wa Kristo. Ni upendo mkubwa mno kupimika lakini si mbali mno kuonjwa.

02-10.body_en: Twenty-six times this psalm repeats: His mercy endures forever. Some truths deserve repetition — say it to yourself all day today.
02-10.body_sw: Mara ishirini na sita zaburi hii inarudia: fadhili zake ni za milele. Kweli nyingine zastahili kurudiwa — jiambie mwenyewe mchana kutwa leo.

02-11.body_en: Neither death nor life nor anything in creation can separate you from God's love in Christ. You are held by a grip that cannot be broken.
02-11.body_sw: Wala mauti wala uzima wala kiumbe kingine chochote hakiwezi kukutenga na upendo wa Mungu ulio katika Kristo. Umeshikwa kwa mkono usioweza kuachia.

02-12.body_en: Behold what manner of love — that we should be called children of God. Your truest identity today is not your job or your struggles, but His child.
02-12.body_sw: Tazameni ni pendo la namna gani — kwamba tuitwe watoto wa Mungu. Utambulisho wako halisi leo si kazi yako wala mapambano yako, bali mtoto wake.

02-13.body_en: God drew Israel with cords of a man, with bands of love. He does not drag His children; He draws them gently.
02-13.body_sw: Mungu aliwavuta Israeli kwa kamba za kibinadamu, kwa mafungo ya upendo. Hawaburuti watoto wake; huwavuta kwa upole.

02-14.body_en: Many waters cannot quench love, neither can floods drown it. Human love at its best is a small picture of God's love at its least.
02-14.body_sw: Maji mengi hayawezi kuuzima upendo, wala mito haiwezi kuuzamisha. Upendo wa kibinadamu katika ubora wake ni picha ndogo ya upendo wa Mungu katika udogo wake.

02-15.body_en: While the prodigal was still far off, the father ran to him. Heaven does not wait with crossed arms; it runs to meet the returning heart.
02-15.body_sw: Mwana mpotevu alipokuwa angali mbali, baba yake alimkimbilia. Mbingu haingoji kwa mikono iliyokunjwa; hukimbia kuupokea moyo unaorudi.

02-16.body_en: The Lord is full of compassion, slow to anger, abundant in mercy and truth. He is more patient with you than you are with yourself.
02-16.body_sw: Bwana amejaa huruma, si mwepesi wa hasira, ni mwingi wa rehema na kweli. Ana subira nawe kuliko ulivyo nayo wewe mwenyewe.

02-17.body_en: The world identifies Jesus' disciples not by their words but by their love. Let someone recognize Him in how you treat them today.
02-17.body_sw: Ulimwengu huwatambua wanafunzi wa Yesu si kwa maneno yao bali kwa upendo wao. Acha mtu amtambue yeye kwa jinsi unavyomtendea leo.

02-18.body_en: Jesus asks the impossible — love your enemies — and then supplies the power to do it. Pray today for the person hardest to love.
02-18.body_sw: Yesu anaomba lisilowezekana — wapendeni adui zenu — kisha hutoa nguvu ya kulitenda. Omba leo kwa ajili ya mtu aliye mgumu zaidi kupendwa.

02-19.body_en: Fervent love covers a multitude of sins. Grace given to others is never wasted; it is the family resemblance of God's children.
02-19.body_sw: Upendo wa jitihada husitiri wingi wa dhambi. Neema unayowapa wengine haipotei kamwe; ni mfanano wa familia ya watoto wa Mungu.

02-20.body_en: Paul made the gospel personal: the Son of God loved me and gave Himself for me. Say those words with your own name in them today.
02-20.body_sw: Paulo aliifanya injili kuwa ya binafsi: Mwana wa Mungu alinipenda akajitoa kwa ajili yangu. Yaseme maneno hayo leo ukiweka jina lako ndani yake.

02-21.body_en: A mother may forget her child, but God will not forget you — you are engraved on the palms of His hands. You are unforgettable to heaven.
02-21.body_sw: Mama aweza kumsahau mtoto wake, lakini Mungu hatakusahau — umechorwa katika vitanga vya mikono yake. Wewe husahauliki mbinguni.

02-22.body_en: All the law hangs on two loves: God with all your heart, and your neighbor as yourself. Every duty of religion is a duty of love.
02-22.body_sw: Torati yote hutegemea mapendo mawili: Mungu kwa moyo wako wote, na jirani yako kama nafsi yako. Kila wajibu wa dini ni wajibu wa upendo.

02-23.body_en: How excellent is God's lovingkindness — people take refuge under the shadow of His wings. Shelter there today from whatever storms are blowing.
02-23.body_sw: Jinsi zilivyo za thamani fadhili za Mungu — wanadamu hukimbilia uvulini mwa mbawa zake. Jificha hapo leo kutokana na dhoruba zozote zinazovuma.

02-24.body_en: Jesus links love to obedience: those who keep His commands are those who love Him. Obedience is love wearing work clothes.
02-24.body_sw: Yesu huunganisha upendo na utii: wazishikao amri zake ndio wampendao. Utii ni upendo uliovaa nguo za kazi.

02-25.body_en: Love works no ill to its neighbor; therefore love is the fulfilling of the law. God's commandments are simply love, spelled out.
02-25.body_sw: Upendo haumfanyii jirani neno baya; basi upendo ndio utimilifu wa sheria. Amri za Mungu ni upendo tu, ulioandikwa wazi.

02-26.body_en: God does not merely have love; He is love. To dwell in love is to dwell in Him, and He in you.
02-26.body_sw: Mungu hana upendo tu; yeye ni upendo. Kukaa katika upendo ni kukaa ndani yake, naye ndani yako.

02-27.body_en: God, who is rich in mercy, made us alive with Christ even when we were dead in sins. Grace is His wealth spent on us.
02-27.body_sw: Mungu, aliye mwingi wa rehema, alituhuisha pamoja na Kristo hata tulipokuwa wafu kwa sababu ya makosa. Neema ni utajiri wake uliotumika kwa ajili yetu.

02-28.body_en: David declared God's lovingkindness better than life itself. When His love is your treasure, no loss can bankrupt you.
02-28.body_sw: Daudi alitangaza fadhili za Mungu kuwa njema kuliko uhai wenyewe. Upendo wake ukiwa hazina yako, hasara yoyote haiwezi kukufilisi.

02-29.body_en: The Lord keeps covenant and mercy to a thousand generations. This rare day is a good day to remember His unbroken faithfulness.
02-29.body_sw: Bwana hushika agano na rehema hata vizazi elfu. Siku hii adimu ni siku njema ya kukumbuka uaminifu wake usiovunjika.

03-01.body_en: Jesus said the Father sees what is done in secret and rewards openly. Build a hidden life of prayer this month, and heaven will notice.
03-01.body_sw: Yesu alisema Baba huona yaliyofanywa sirini na kulipa kwa wazi. Jenga maisha ya siri ya maombi mwezi huu, na mbingu itaona.

03-02.body_en: Unceasing prayer is not endless kneeling but constant connection. Keep the line open to heaven all day today.
03-02.body_sw: Kuomba bila kukoma si kupiga magoti bila mwisho bali ni mawasiliano yasiyokatika. Weka njia ya mbinguni wazi mchana kutwa leo.

03-03.body_en: Paul's remedy for anxiety is prayer with thanksgiving — and the result is peace that passes understanding. Trade every worry for a prayer today.
03-03.body_sw: Dawa ya Paulo kwa wasiwasi ni maombi pamoja na shukrani — na matokeo yake ni amani ipitayo akili zote. Badilisha kila wasiwasi kuwa ombi leo.

03-04.body_en: Jesus rose before daylight to pray in a solitary place. If the Son of God needed morning communion, how much more do we?
03-04.body_sw: Yesu aliamka kabla ya mapambazuko kwenda kuomba mahali pa faragha. Ikiwa Mwana wa Mungu alihitaji ushirika wa asubuhi, sisi tunahitaji zaidi kiasi gani?

03-05.body_en: In the morning, direct your prayer to God and look up expectantly. Prayer is not just speaking — it is watching for the answer.
03-05.body_sw: Asubuhi, elekeza maombi yako kwa Mungu na utazame juu kwa matarajio. Maombi si kusema tu — ni kungojea jibu kwa macho.

03-06.body_en: The disciples never asked Jesus to teach them to preach, but they asked Him to teach them to pray. Make that your request today.
03-06.body_sw: Wanafunzi hawakuwahi kumwomba Yesu awafundishe kuhubiri, lakini walimwomba awafundishe kuomba. Fanya hilo kuwa ombi lako leo.

03-07.body_en: The throne we approach is a throne of grace, not of judgment. Come boldly today — mercy and help are waiting there.
03-07.body_sw: Kiti cha enzi tunachokikaribia ni cha neema, si cha hukumu. Njoo kwa ujasiri leo — rehema na msaada vinakungoja hapo.

03-08.body_en: The earnest prayer of a righteous person accomplishes much. Prayer is not the least you can do for someone — it is the most.
03-08.body_sw: Ombi la bidii la mtu mwenye haki lafaa sana. Maombi si jambo dogo zaidi unaloweza kumfanyia mtu — ni kubwa zaidi.

03-09.body_en: Jesus warned that the spirit is willing but the flesh is weak. Prayer is the watchman that keeps temptation outside the gate.
03-09.body_sw: Yesu alionya kwamba roho i radhi lakini mwili ni dhaifu. Maombi ni mlinzi anayezuia majaribu nje ya lango.

03-10.body_en: Cast your burden on the Lord and He will sustain you. God invites you to transfer the weight you were never meant to carry.
03-10.body_sw: Umtwike Bwana mzigo wako naye atakutegemeza. Mungu anakualika kumhamishia uzito ambao hukukusudiwa kuubeba.

03-11.body_en: Daniel prayed three times a day even when prayer became illegal. A prayer habit built in calm weather will hold in the storm.
03-11.body_sw: Danieli aliomba mara tatu kwa siku hata maombi yalipoharamishwa. Mazoea ya maombi yaliyojengwa wakati wa utulivu yatasimama katika dhoruba.

03-12.body_en: Jesus promised His presence where two or three gather in His name. Find a prayer partner — some blessings are unlocked together.
03-12.body_sw: Yesu aliahidi uwepo wake mahali wawili au watatu walipokusanyika kwa jina lake. Tafuta mwenzi wa maombi — baraka nyingine hufunguliwa kwa pamoja.

03-13.body_en: Confidence in prayer comes from praying according to His will. The goal of prayer is not to change God's mind but to receive God's best.
03-13.body_sw: Ujasiri katika maombi hutoka katika kuomba kwa mapenzi yake. Lengo la maombi si kubadilisha nia ya Mungu bali kupokea kilicho bora chake.

03-14.body_en: Jesus told a parable that we ought always to pray and not lose heart. Delay is not denial; keep knocking.
03-14.body_sw: Yesu alitoa mfano kwamba imetupasa kuomba daima wala tusikate tamaa. Kuchelewa si kukataliwa; endelea kubisha.

03-15.body_en: The righteous cry out and the Lord hears and delivers them from all their troubles. No prayer of yours has ever gone unheard.
03-15.body_sw: Wenye haki hulia na Bwana husikia, huwaponya na taabu zao zote. Hakuna ombi lako lililowahi kutosikiwa.

03-16.body_en: The Lord's Prayer begins with God's name, kingdom, and will before our bread, debts, and battles. Let His priorities order your prayers today.
03-16.body_sw: Sala ya Bwana huanza na jina la Mungu, ufalme wake, na mapenzi yake kabla ya mkate wetu, deni zetu, na vita vyetu. Acha vipaumbele vyake vipange maombi yako leo.

03-17.body_en: God promises that when His people humble themselves and pray, He hears, forgives, and heals. Revival begins on someone's knees — why not yours?
03-17.body_sw: Mungu anaahidi kwamba watu wake wakijinyenyekeza na kuomba, yeye husikia, husamehe, na huponya. Uamsho huanza magotini mwa mtu — kwa nini si kwako?

03-18.body_en: When you do not know what to pray, the Spirit intercedes with groanings too deep for words. Your weakest prayers have a mighty Helper.
03-18.body_sw: Usipojua la kuomba, Roho hutuombea kwa kuugua kusikoweza kutamkwa. Maombi yako dhaifu zaidi yana Msaidizi mwenye nguvu.

03-19.body_en: Jesus taught praying with faith that receives before it sees. Faith treats God's promise as being as good as the gift itself.
03-19.body_sw: Yesu alifundisha kuomba kwa imani inayopokea kabla ya kuona. Imani huchukulia ahadi ya Mungu kuwa sawa na zawadi yenyewe.

03-20.body_en: Trust in Him at all times; pour out your heart before Him. God is a refuge that can handle your honesty.
03-20.body_sw: Mtumainini sikuzote; mimineni mioyo yenu mbele zake. Mungu ni kimbilio linaloweza kubeba ukweli wako wote.

03-21.body_en: God promises: before they call, I will answer. His provision is often already on the road before your prayer leaves your lips.
03-21.body_sw: Mungu anaahidi: kabla hawajaniita, nitajibu. Riziki yake mara nyingi tayari iko njiani kabla ombi lako halijatoka midomoni mwako.

03-22.body_en: After feeding thousands, Jesus went up the mountain alone to pray. Ministry to many must be balanced by solitude with One.
03-22.body_sw: Baada ya kulisha maelfu, Yesu alipanda mlimani peke yake kuomba. Huduma kwa wengi sharti isawazishwe na faragha na Mmoja.

03-23.body_en: Paul ends the armor of God with prayer — the atmosphere in which all other armor works. A soldier out of contact with headquarters is in danger.
03-23.body_sw: Paulo humalizia silaha za Mungu kwa maombi — hewa ambamo silaha nyingine zote hufanya kazi. Askari asiyewasiliana na makao makuu yu hatarini.

03-24.body_en: David asked that his prayer rise as incense, his lifted hands as the evening sacrifice. Your prayers are fragrant to God.
03-24.body_sw: Daudi aliomba maombi yake yapande kama uvumba, kuinua mikono yake kama dhabihu ya jioni. Maombi yako yana harufu nzuri kwa Mungu.

03-25.body_en: In Gethsemane Jesus prayed the hardest prayer: not My will, but Yours. Surrender is the summit of prayer.
03-25.body_sw: Getsemane Yesu aliomba ombi gumu zaidi: si mapenzi yangu, bali yako. Kujisalimisha ndicho kilele cha maombi.

03-26.body_en: Hannah poured out her soul before the Lord in wordless anguish, and God heard. Tears can be prayers too.
03-26.body_sw: Hana alimimina nafsi yake mbele za Bwana kwa uchungu usio na maneno, na Mungu akasikia. Machozi nayo yaweza kuwa maombi.

03-27.body_en: While Peter was in prison, the church prayed without ceasing — and chains fell off. Prayer moves what force cannot.
03-27.body_sw: Petro alipokuwa gerezani, kanisa liliomba bila kukoma — na minyororo ikaanguka. Maombi huondoa kile ambacho nguvu haziwezi.

03-28.body_en: Cherished sin muffles prayer, but God certainly heard the psalmist's cleansed cry. Come honestly, confess quickly, and pray freely.
03-28.body_sw: Dhambi inayofichwa moyoni huziba maombi, lakini hakika Mungu alisikia kilio cha mtunga zaburi aliyetakaswa. Njoo kwa unyofu, ungama upesi, uombe kwa uhuru.

03-29.body_en: Jonah prayed from the belly of the fish, and even there God heard. No place is too deep for prayer to reach heaven.
03-29.body_sw: Yona aliomba kutoka tumbo la samaki, na hata huko Mungu alisikia. Hakuna mahali pa kina mno ambapo maombi hayawezi kufika mbinguni.

03-30.body_en: If earthly fathers give good gifts, how much more your Father in heaven? Prayer is a child asking a Father who delights to give.
03-30.body_sw: Ikiwa baba wa duniani hutoa zawadi njema, si zaidi sana Baba yenu aliye mbinguni? Maombi ni mtoto kumwomba Baba anayefurahia kutoa.

03-31.body_en: Because God inclined His ear, the psalmist resolved to pray as long as he lived. Answered prayer is fuel for a lifetime of praying.
03-31.body_sw: Kwa sababu Mungu alitega sikio lake, mtunga zaburi aliazimia kuomba siku zote za maisha yake. Maombi yaliyojibiwa ni nishati ya maisha yote ya kuomba.

04-01.body_en: He was wounded for our transgressions, and by His stripes we are healed. Every scar of Christ is a receipt of your redemption.
04-01.body_sw: Alijeruhiwa kwa makosa yetu, na kwa kupigwa kwake sisi tumepona. Kila kovu la Kristo ni stakabadhi ya ukombozi wako.

04-02.body_en: Jesus' final cry was not defeat but completion: it is finished. Salvation is not a project you complete; it is a gift He completed.
04-02.body_sw: Kilio cha mwisho cha Yesu hakikuwa cha kushindwa bali cha ukamilifu: imekwisha. Wokovu si mradi unaoukamilisha wewe; ni zawadi aliyoikamilisha yeye.

04-03.body_en: Sin pays wages — death; God gives a gift — eternal life. Never confuse what you earn with what He gives.
04-03.body_sw: Dhambi hulipa mshahara — mauti; Mungu hutoa karama — uzima wa milele. Usichanganye kamwe unachostahili na anachokipa yeye.

04-04.body_en: Christ carried our sins in His own body on the tree, so we might die to sin and live to righteousness. The cross is both pardon and power.
04-04.body_sw: Kristo alizichukua dhambi zetu katika mwili wake juu ya mti, ili tufe kwa dhambi na kuishi kwa haki. Msalaba ni msamaha na pia nguvu.

04-05.body_en: From the cross Jesus prayed for His executioners. If He forgave those who nailed Him, He will surely forgive those who come to Him.
04-05.body_sw: Kutoka msalabani Yesu aliwaombea waliomsulubisha. Ikiwa aliwasamehe waliompigilia misumari, hakika atawasamehe wanaomjia.

04-06.body_en: He who knew no sin became sin for us, that we might become God's righteousness in Him. Heaven's math: your sin for His righteousness.
04-06.body_sw: Yeye asiyejua dhambi alifanywa kuwa dhambi kwa ajili yetu, ili tupate kuwa haki ya Mungu ndani yake. Hesabu ya mbinguni: dhambi yako kwa haki yake.

04-07.body_en: In Christ we have redemption through His blood, the forgiveness of sins, according to the riches of His grace. Forgiveness flows not from your merit but from His riches.
04-07.body_sw: Katika Kristo tunao ukombozi kwa damu yake, msamaha wa dhambi, sawasawa na utajiri wa neema yake. Msamaha hautoki katika kustahili kwako bali katika utajiri wake.

04-08.body_en: A dying thief prayed nine words and gained paradise. It is never too late to turn to Jesus — and never too early.
04-08.body_sw: Mwizi aliyekufa aliomba maneno machache tu na kupata paradiso. Hakuna kuchelewa kumgeukia Yesu — wala hakuna mapema mno.

04-09.title_en: For the Joy Set Before Him
04-09.body_en: Jesus endured the cross for the joy set before Him — and that joy included you. Keep your eyes on Him and run your race.
04-09.body_sw: Yesu alistahimili msalaba kwa ajili ya furaha iliyowekwa mbele yake — na furaha hiyo ilikujumuisha wewe. Kaza macho yako kwake na ukimbie mbio zako.

04-10.body_en: When Jesus died, the temple veil tore from top to bottom — God's doing, not man's. The way into His presence is open forever.
04-10.body_sw: Yesu alipokufa, pazia la hekalu lilipasuka toka juu hata chini — kazi ya Mungu, si ya mwanadamu. Njia ya kuingia mbele zake iko wazi milele.

04-11.body_en: Justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ. The war is over; you are welcomed home.
04-11.body_sw: Tukiisha kuhesabiwa haki kwa imani, tuna amani na Mungu kwa njia ya Bwana wetu Yesu Kristo. Vita vimekwisha; umekaribishwa nyumbani.

04-12.body_en: Christ is risen, the firstfruits of those who sleep. His empty tomb is the guarantee that graves do not get the last word.
04-12.body_sw: Kristo amefufuka, malimbuko ya waliolala. Kaburi lake tupu ni dhamana kwamba makaburi hayana neno la mwisho.

04-13.body_en: Jesus does not merely give resurrection; He is the resurrection and the life. Believe in Him, and death becomes a doorway, not a wall.
04-13.body_sw: Yesu hatoi ufufuo tu; yeye ndiye ufufuo na uzima. Mwamini yeye, na mauti huwa mlango, si ukuta.

04-14.title_en: Why Seek the Living Among the Dead
04-14.title_sw: Kwa Nini Kumtafuta Aliye Hai Kaburini
04-14.body_en: The angels asked why the women sought the living among the dead: He is not here, He is risen. We serve a living Saviour, not a memory.
04-14.body_sw: Malaika waliuliza kwa nini wanawake wanamtafuta aliye hai kati ya wafu: hayupo hapa, amefufuka. Tunamtumikia Mwokozi aliye hai, si kumbukumbu.

04-15.body_en: Jesus was delivered up for our offenses and raised for our justification. The resurrection is heaven's receipt that the payment was accepted.
04-15.body_sw: Yesu alitolewa kwa ajili ya makosa yetu na kufufuliwa ili tuhesabiwe haki. Ufufuo ni stakabadhi ya mbinguni kwamba malipo yalikubaliwa.

04-16.body_en: Paul's ambition was to know Christ and the power of His resurrection. That same power that emptied the tomb is available for your today.
04-16.body_sw: Shauku ya Paulo ilikuwa kumjua Kristo na nguvu za ufufuo wake. Nguvu ile ile iliyoacha kaburi tupu inapatikana kwa ajili ya leo yako.

04-17.body_en: Jesus met Thomas's doubt with evidence and an invitation. Honest doubters who come close enough to look will leave worshiping.
04-17.body_sw: Yesu alikutana na shaka ya Tomaso kwa ushahidi na mwaliko. Wenye shaka waaminifu wanaokaribia kutazama huondoka wakiabudu.

04-18.body_en: There is salvation in no one else, for no other name under heaven can save us. Christ is not one option among many; He is the only door.
04-18.body_sw: Wokovu haumo katika mwingine awaye yote, kwa maana hapana jina jingine chini ya mbingu liwezalo kutuokoa. Kristo si mojawapo ya njia nyingi; ndiye mlango pekee.

04-19.body_en: He saved us not by works of righteousness we have done, but according to His mercy. Salvation's foundation is His kindness, not your performance.
04-19.body_sw: Alituokoa si kwa matendo ya haki tuliyoyatenda sisi, bali kwa rehema yake. Msingi wa wokovu ni wema wake, si utendaji wako.

04-20.body_en: Jesus gives His sheep eternal life, and no one can snatch them from His hand. Your security rests in the strength of His grip, not yours.
04-20.body_sw: Yesu huwapa kondoo wake uzima wa milele, wala hakuna atakayewapokonya mkononi mwake. Usalama wako umo katika nguvu ya mshiko wake, si wako.

04-21.body_en: Though your sins are like scarlet, they shall be white as snow. God's forgiveness does not bleach sin partially — it makes you new entirely.
04-21.body_sw: Dhambi zenu zijapokuwa nyekundu sana, zitakuwa nyeupe kama theluji. Msamaha wa Mungu hausafishi dhambi nusu — hukufanya mpya kabisa.

04-22.title_en: Into the Depths of the Sea
04-22.body_en: God casts our sins into the depths of the sea. What He has drowned, do not fish out again.
04-22.body_sw: Mungu hutupa dhambi zetu katika vilindi vya bahari. Alichokizamisha, usikivue tena.

04-23.body_en: Behold the Lamb of God who takes away the sin of the world. Every sacrifice of the Old Testament was a signpost pointing to Him.
04-23.body_sw: Tazama Mwana-kondoo wa Mungu aichukuaye dhambi ya ulimwengu. Kila dhabihu ya Agano la Kale ilikuwa kibao kinachomwelekeza yeye.

04-24.body_en: Confess with your mouth and believe in your heart that God raised Him from the dead, and you will be saved. Salvation is that near — in your mouth and heart.
04-24.body_sw: Kiri kwa kinywa chako na kuamini moyoni mwako ya kuwa Mungu alimfufua katika wafu, nawe utaokoka. Wokovu u karibu hivyo — kinywani mwako na moyoni mwako.

04-25.body_en: By grace you are saved through faith, and that not of yourselves — it is the gift of God. No one will boast in heaven except in Christ.
04-25.body_sw: Kwa neema mmeokolewa, kwa njia ya imani, ambayo hiyo haikutokana na nafsi zenu — ni kipawa cha Mungu. Hakuna atakayejisifu mbinguni isipokuwa katika Kristo.

04-26.body_en: If we confess our sins, He is faithful and just to forgive and to cleanse. Confession is not informing God — it is agreeing with Him and receiving grace.
04-26.body_sw: Tukiziungama dhambi zetu, yeye ni mwaminifu na wa haki hata atuondolee na kutusafisha. Kuungama si kumjulisha Mungu — ni kukubaliana naye na kupokea neema.

04-27.title_en: Seek the Lord While He May Be Found
04-27.body_en: Seek the Lord while He may be found; He will abundantly pardon. God's mercy has a wide door, but wisdom enters today.
04-27.body_sw: Mtafuteni Bwana maadamu anapatikana; atasamehe kwa ukarimu. Rehema ya Mungu ina mlango mpana, lakini hekima huingia leo.

04-28.body_en: Whoever comes to Jesus He will by no means cast out. Come with your doubts, your failures, your history — the welcome stands.
04-28.body_sw: Yeyote ajaye kwa Yesu hatamtupa nje kamwe. Njoo na shaka zako, kushindwa kwako, historia yako — karibu ingalipo.

04-29.body_en: There is now no condemnation for those in Christ Jesus. The verdict is already in; live today as one set free.
04-29.body_sw: Sasa hakuna hukumu ya adhabu juu yao walio katika Kristo Yesu. Hukumu tayari imetolewa; ishi leo kama aliyewekwa huru.

04-30.body_en: David prayed for a clean heart and the restored joy of salvation. Salvation is not only a rescue from sin but a return to joy.
04-30.body_sw: Daudi aliomba moyo safi na kurudishiwa furaha ya wokovu. Wokovu si kuokolewa na dhambi tu bali pia kurudi katika furaha.

05-01.body_en: Jesus promised another Comforter to abide with us forever. You are not navigating this life alone — the Spirit of truth dwells with you.
05-01.body_sw: Yesu aliahidi Msaidizi mwingine akae nasi milele. Husafiri maisha haya peke yako — Roho wa kweli anakaa pamoja nawe.

05-02.body_en: The Spirit's power is given for a purpose: to make us witnesses. Pentecost was not a spectacle but a sending.
05-02.body_sw: Nguvu ya Roho hutolewa kwa kusudi: kutufanya mashahidi. Pentekoste haikuwa tamasha bali kutumwa.

05-03.body_en: Love, joy, peace, patience, kindness — the Spirit grows fruit, not just gifts. Character is the surest evidence of His indwelling.
05-03.body_sw: Upendo, furaha, amani, uvumilivu, utu wema — Roho huzaa tunda, si karama tu. Tabia ndiyo ushahidi thabiti zaidi wa kukaa kwake ndani.

05-04.body_en: God promises to replace the heart of stone with a heart of flesh. He does not renovate the old nature; He gives a new one.
05-04.body_sw: Mungu anaahidi kuondoa moyo wa jiwe na kutoa moyo wa nyama. Hakarabati asili ya zamani; hutoa mpya.

05-05.body_en: The Spirit moves like the wind — unseen, yet unmistakable in effect. You cannot control Him, but you can set your sails.
05-05.body_sw: Roho hutenda kama upepo — haonekani, lakini matokeo yake ni dhahiri. Huwezi kumtawala, lakini waweza kutanda matanga yako.

05-06.body_en: As many as are led by the Spirit of God, these are the children of God. Sonship is proven by followship.
05-06.body_sw: Wote wanaoongozwa na Roho wa Mungu, hao ndio wana wa Mungu. Kuwa mwana huthibitishwa kwa kufuata.

05-07.body_en: The Spirit can be grieved — He is a Person, not a power. Treat His promptings today with the tenderness of friendship.
05-07.body_sw: Roho anaweza kuhuzunishwa — ni Nafsi, si nguvu tu. Shughulikia maonyo yake leo kwa upole wa urafiki.

05-08.body_en: Not by might, nor by power, but by My Spirit, says the Lord. God's work done God's way never lacks God's supply.
05-08.body_sw: Si kwa uwezo, wala si kwa nguvu, bali ni kwa Roho yangu, asema Bwana. Kazi ya Mungu inayofanywa kwa njia ya Mungu haikosi riziki ya Mungu.

05-09.body_en: If earthly fathers give good gifts, how much more will the Father give the Holy Spirit to those who ask. Ask daily — He is the gift that brings all others.
05-09.body_sw: Ikiwa baba wa duniani huwapa watoto zawadi njema, si zaidi Baba wa mbinguni atawapa Roho Mtakatifu wale wamwombao. Omba kila siku — yeye ni zawadi iletayo nyingine zote.

05-10.body_en: God has not given us a spirit of fear, but of power, love, and a sound mind. When fear knocks today, let the Spirit answer the door.
05-10.body_sw: Mungu hakutupa roho ya woga, bali ya nguvu na ya upendo na ya moyo wa kiasi. Hofu ikibisha leo, mwache Roho afungue mlango.

05-11.body_en: The Spirit of truth guides into all truth, always glorifying Christ. Any voice that dims Jesus is not His voice.
05-11.body_sw: Roho wa kweli huongoza katika kweli yote, daima akimtukuza Kristo. Sauti yoyote inayomfifisha Yesu si sauti yake.

05-12.body_en: You are the temple of God, and His Spirit dwells in you. Carry yourself today like sacred ground.
05-12.body_sw: Ninyi ni hekalu la Mungu, na Roho wake anakaa ndani yenu. Jibebe leo kama mahali patakatifu.

05-13.body_en: David's deepest fear after his fall was losing God's Spirit. Guard the Presence in your life above every other treasure.
05-13.body_sw: Hofu kuu ya Daudi baada ya kuanguka ilikuwa kumpoteza Roho wa Mungu. Linda Uwepo katika maisha yako kuliko hazina nyingine yoyote.

05-14.body_en: God promised to pour His Spirit on all flesh — sons, daughters, old, young. No believer is too small for the Spirit's filling.
05-14.body_sw: Mungu aliahidi kumwaga Roho wake juu ya wote wenye mwili — wana, binti, wazee, vijana. Hakuna muumini mdogo mno kwa kujazwa na Roho.

05-15.body_en: Walk in the Spirit and you will not fulfill the lusts of the flesh. Victory is less about fighting sin and more about following Him.
05-15.body_sw: Enendeni kwa Roho, wala hamtazitimiza kamwe tamaa za mwili. Ushindi si sana kupigana na dhambi bali ni kumfuata yeye.

05-16.body_en: The Spirit Himself bears witness with our spirit that we are God's children. Assurance is not arrogance; it is the Spirit's whisper received.
05-16.body_sw: Roho mwenyewe hushuhudia pamoja na roho zetu ya kuwa sisi tu watoto wa Mungu. Uhakika si kiburi; ni mnong'ono wa Roho uliopokelewa.

05-17.body_en: Jesus promised rivers of living water flowing from those who believe. The Spirit-filled life does not merely receive — it overflows.
05-17.body_sw: Yesu aliahidi mito ya maji yaliyo hai kutiririka kutoka kwa waaminio. Maisha yaliyojazwa Roho hayapokei tu — hufurika.

05-18.body_en: Your ears shall hear a word behind you saying, this is the way, walk in it. God still speaks to those who still listen.
05-18.body_sw: Masikio yako yatasikia neno nyuma yako likisema, njia ni hii, ikafuateni. Mungu bado huzungumza na wale ambao bado husikiliza.

05-19.body_en: Grow in grace and in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ. Growth is not optional for the believer; stagnation is retreat.
05-19.body_sw: Kueni katika neema na katika kumjua Bwana wetu Yesu Kristo. Ukuaji si hiari kwa muumini; kusimama tuli ni kurudi nyuma.

05-20.body_en: As you received Christ, so walk in Him — rooted, built up, established, abounding in thanksgiving. Deep roots make tall trees.
05-20.body_sw: Kama mlivyompokea Kristo, enendeni vivyo hivyo ndani yake — wenye mizizi, mkijengwa, mkithibitika, mkizidi kutoa shukrani. Mizizi ya kina hufanya miti mirefu.

05-21.body_en: He who began a good work in you will complete it. Your growth has a guarantor, and He does not abandon projects.
05-21.body_sw: Yeye aliyeanza kazi njema ndani yako ataimaliza. Ukuaji wako una mdhamini, naye haachi miradi yake.

05-22.body_en: Apart from Christ we can do nothing; abiding in Him we bear much fruit. The branch's one job is to stay connected.
05-22.body_sw: Pasipo Kristo hatuwezi kufanya neno lolote; tukikaa ndani yake twazaa sana. Kazi moja ya tawi ni kubaki limeungana.

05-23.title_en: Desire the Milk of the Word
05-23.body_en: As newborn babies desire milk, so crave the pure Word and grow. Appetite for Scripture is a vital sign of spiritual health.
05-23.body_sw: Kama watoto wachanga watamanivyo maziwa, yatamanini maziwa ya Neno safi mpate kukua. Hamu ya Maandiko ni ishara muhimu ya afya ya kiroho.

05-24.body_en: Mature believers digest solid food, their senses trained to discern good and evil. Do not stay on milk when God offers meat.
05-24.body_sw: Waumini waliokomaa hula chakula kigumu, hisia zao zimezoezwa kupambanua mema na mabaya. Usibaki kwenye maziwa Mungu anapotoa chakula kigumu.

05-25.body_en: Beholding the Lord, we are changed into His image from glory to glory. You become like what you behold — so behold Christ.
05-25.body_sw: Tukimtazama Bwana, twabadilishwa kufanana na mfano wake toka utukufu hadi utukufu. Unafanana na unachokitazama — basi mtazame Kristo.

05-26.body_en: Be filled with the Spirit — a continuous command, not a one-time event. Yesterday's filling is not enough for today's battles.
05-26.body_sw: Mjazwe Roho — amri ya kuendelea, si tukio la mara moja. Kujazwa kwa jana hakutoshi kwa vita vya leo.

05-27.body_en: The righteous flourish like the palm tree and still bear fruit in old age. In God's orchard, no season of life is barren.
05-27.body_sw: Wenye haki hustawi kama mtende na huzaa matunda hata wakati wa uzee. Katika shamba la Mungu, hakuna kipindi cha maisha kisichozaa.

05-28.body_en: The good soil bears fruit with patience. Spiritual growth is agricultural, not instant — keep the soil of your heart honest and soft.
05-28.body_sw: Udongo mzuri huzaa matunda kwa kuvumilia. Ukuaji wa kiroho ni wa kilimo, si wa papo hapo — weka udongo wa moyo wako kuwa mnyofu na laini.

05-29.body_en: Bodily exercise profits a little, but godliness is profitable for all things. Train your soul with the same discipline athletes give their bodies.
05-29.body_sw: Mazoezi ya mwili yafaa kidogo, bali utauwa hufaa kwa mambo yote. Zoeza nafsi yako kwa nidhamu ile ile wanariadha wanayoipa miili yao.

05-30.body_en: Be doers of the Word, not hearers only, deceiving yourselves. A sermon is not over until it is obeyed.
05-30.body_sw: Iweni watendaji wa Neno, wala si wasikiaji tu, mkijidanganya nafsi zenu. Mahubiri hayajaisha mpaka yametiiwa.

05-31.body_en: Let us press on to know the Lord; His going forth is as certain as the dawn. Knowing God is a pursuit, and the pursuit is rewarded.
05-31.body_sw: Na tukaze kumjua Bwana; kutokea kwake ni yakini kama asubuhi. Kumjua Mungu ni jitihada, na jitihada hiyo huzawadiwa.

06-01.body_en: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom. All true knowledge starts with knowing who God is — and who we are before Him.
06-01.body_sw: Kumcha Bwana ndio mwanzo wa hekima. Maarifa yote ya kweli huanza kwa kumjua Mungu ni nani — na sisi ni nani mbele zake.

06-02.body_en: Guard your heart with all diligence, for out of it flow the issues of life. What you let in today becomes who you are tomorrow.
06-02.body_sw: Linda moyo wako kuliko yote uyalindayo, maana ndiko zitokako chemchemi za uzima. Unachokiruhusu kuingia leo huwa wewe wa kesho.

06-03.body_en: A soft answer turns away wrath, but a harsh word stirs up anger. Today you will choose between escalation and peace — choose softly.
06-03.body_sw: Jawabu la upole hugeuza hasira, bali neno liumizalo huchochea ghadhabu. Leo utachagua kati ya kuchochea na amani — chagua kwa upole.

06-04.body_en: A merry heart does good like medicine. Joy is not denial of hardship; it is medicine God prescribes within it.
06-04.body_sw: Moyo uliochangamka ni dawa nzuri. Furaha si kukana shida; ni dawa ambayo Mungu huiandika ndani yake.

06-05.title_en: A Friend Closer Than a Brother
06-05.body_en: There is a friend who sticks closer than a brother. Choose friends wisely — and be the friend Jesus has been to you.
06-05.body_sw: Yuko rafiki aambatanaye na mtu kuliko ndugu. Chagua marafiki kwa hekima — na uwe rafiki kama Yesu alivyokuwa kwako.

06-06.body_en: A good name is to be chosen rather than great riches. Reputation is built in years and spent in seconds — guard yours today.
06-06.body_sw: Heri kuchagua jina jema kuliko mali nyingi. Sifa hujengwa kwa miaka na hutumika kwa sekunde — ilinde yako leo.

06-07.body_en: Honor the Lord with your possessions and the firstfruits of your increase. Giving God the first share declares He owns the whole.
06-07.body_sw: Mheshimu Bwana kwa mali zako na kwa malimbuko ya mazao yako. Kumpa Mungu fungu la kwanza hutangaza kwamba anamiliki yote.

06-08.body_en: To everything there is a season, a time for every purpose under heaven. God writes in chapters — trust the one you are in.
06-08.body_sw: Kwa kila jambo kuna majira yake, na wakati kwa kila kusudi chini ya mbingu. Mungu huandika kwa sura — amini ile uliyomo.

06-09.body_en: Pride goes before destruction, and a haughty spirit before a fall. Humility is not weakness; it is the safest place to stand.
06-09.body_sw: Kiburi hutangulia uangamivu, na roho yenye kutakabari hutangulia maanguko. Unyenyekevu si udhaifu; ni mahali salama zaidi pa kusimama.

06-10.body_en: As iron sharpens iron, so a person sharpens the countenance of a friend. Stay close to people who make you more like Christ.
06-10.body_sw: Chuma hunoa chuma; kadhalika mtu humnoa mwenzake. Kaa karibu na watu wanaokufanya ufanane zaidi na Kristo.

06-11.body_en: The wisdom from above is pure, peaceable, gentle, full of mercy. Check the fruit of your counsel — heaven's wisdom builds up.
06-11.body_sw: Hekima itokayo juu ni safi, ya amani, ya upole, imejaa rehema. Chunguza matunda ya shauri lako — hekima ya mbinguni hujenga.

06-12.body_en: The generous soul will be made rich, and he who waters will be watered himself. God's economy rewards the open hand.
06-12.body_sw: Nafsi ya ukarimu itanenepeshwa, naye anyweshaye atanyweshwa mwenyewe. Uchumi wa Mungu huzawadia mkono ulio wazi.

06-13.body_en: Remember your Creator in the days of your youth. The earlier God gets your years, the more of them He can bless.
06-13.body_sw: Mkumbuke Muumba wako siku za ujana wako. Kadiri Mungu anavyopata miaka yako mapema, ndivyo anavyoweza kuibariki zaidi.

06-14.body_en: The fear of man brings a snare, but whoever trusts in the Lord shall be safe. Live for an audience of One today.
06-14.body_sw: Kuwaogopa wanadamu huleta mtego, bali amtumainiye Bwana atakuwa salama. Ishi leo kwa ajili ya mtazamaji Mmoja.

06-15.body_en: There is a way that seems right to a man, but its end is the way of death. Feelings are poor compasses; let Scripture set your course.
06-15.body_sw: Iko njia ionekanayo kuwa sawa machoni pa mtu, lakini mwisho wake ni njia za mauti. Hisia ni dira mbaya; acha Maandiko yaweke mwelekeo wako.

06-16.body_en: The humble He guides in justice, and the humble He teaches His way. Pride cannot be led; humility cannot be lost.
06-16.body_sw: Wenye upole atawaongoza katika hukumu, wenye upole atawafundisha njia yake. Kiburi hakiwezi kuongozwa; unyenyekevu hauwezi kupotea.

06-17.body_en: The way of a fool is right in his own eyes, but the wise listen to counsel. Invite trusted voices to speak into your decisions.
06-17.body_sw: Njia ya mpumbavu imenyoka machoni pake mwenyewe, bali yeye aliye na hekima husikiliza shauri. Karibisha sauti za kuaminika kunena katika maamuzi yako.

06-18.body_en: Solomon asked not for riches but for an understanding heart. When God offers you anything, ask for wisdom — everything else follows.
06-18.body_sw: Sulemani hakuomba utajiri bali moyo wa ufahamu. Mungu anapokupa chochote, omba hekima — mengine yote hufuata.

06-19.body_en: In the multitude of words sin is not lacking, but the wise restrain their lips. Today, let silence do some of your talking.
06-19.body_sw: Katika wingi wa maneno hapakosi kuwa na maovu, bali yeye azuiaye midomo yake hufanya akili. Leo, acha kimya kizungumze baadhi ya maneno yako.

06-20.body_en: Two are better than one, for if they fall, one will lift up his companion. God designed us for fellowship — do not walk alone.
06-20.body_sw: Afadhali kuwa wawili kuliko mmoja, maana wakianguka, mmoja atamwinua mwenzake. Mungu alituumba kwa ushirika — usitembee peke yako.

06-21.body_en: Go to the ant, consider her ways and be wise. God hides sermons in small creatures — diligence needs no supervisor.
06-21.body_sw: Mwendee chungu, zitafakari njia zake ukapate hekima. Mungu huficha mahubiri katika viumbe vidogo — bidii haihitaji msimamizi.

06-22.body_en: I have hidden Your Word in my heart that I might not sin against You. Memorized Scripture is armor you never leave home without.
06-22.body_sw: Moyoni mwangu nimeliweka neno lako, nisije nikakutenda dhambi. Maandiko yaliyohifadhiwa moyoni ni silaha usiyoiacha nyumbani kamwe.

06-23.body_en: Charm is deceitful and beauty is passing, but a woman who fears the Lord shall be praised. Character outlasts every mirror.
06-23.body_sw: Upendeleo hudanganya, na uzuri ni ubatili, bali mwanamke amchaye Bwana ndiye atakayesifiwa. Tabia hudumu kuliko kila kioo.

06-24.body_en: I am the Lord your God who teaches you to profit, who leads you by the way you should go. God's commands are not fences but signposts to flourishing.
06-24.body_sw: Mimi ni Bwana, Mungu wako, nikufundishaye ili upate faida, nikuongozaye kwa njia ikupasayo kuifuata. Amri za Mungu si ua bali ni vibao vya njia ya kustawi.

06-25.body_en: A righteous man falls seven times and rises again. Failure is an event, not an identity — get up in God's grace today.
06-25.body_sw: Mwenye haki huanguka mara saba akainuka tena. Kushindwa ni tukio, si utambulisho — inuka katika neema ya Mungu leo.

06-26.body_en: God is in heaven and you on earth; therefore let your words be few. Reverence begins where chatter ends.
06-26.body_sw: Mungu yuko mbinguni nawe u duniani; kwa hiyo maneno yako na yawe machache. Kicho huanza pale porojo inapoishia.

06-27.body_en: A man's steps are of the Lord; how then can a man understand his own way? You do not need to decode the whole map — walk with the Guide.
06-27.body_sw: Hatua za mtu husimamishwa na Bwana; basi mtu awezaje kuifahamu njia yake mwenyewe? Huhitaji kufumbua ramani yote — tembea na Kiongozi.

06-28.body_en: Be swift to hear, slow to speak, slow to wrath. This one verse, obeyed, would heal half our conflicts.
06-28.body_sw: Kila mtu na awe mwepesi wa kusikia, si mwepesi wa kusema wala kukasirika. Mstari huu mmoja, ukitiwa, ungeponya nusu ya migogoro yetu.

06-29.body_en: Whoever covers his sins will not prosper, but whoever confesses and forsakes them will have mercy. Hiding is heavy; confession is freedom.
06-29.body_sw: Afichaye dhambi zake hatafanikiwa, bali yeye aziungamaye na kuziacha atapata rehema. Kuficha ni mzigo; kuungama ni uhuru.

06-30.body_en: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable in Your sight, O Lord. End this month asking God to approve both your speech and your thoughts.
06-30.body_sw: Maneno ya kinywa changu na mawazo ya moyo wangu yapate kibali mbele zako, Ee Bwana. Maliza mwezi huu ukimwomba Mungu akubali kauli zako na fikira zako pia.

07-01.body_en: Jesus invites the weary: come to Me, and I will give you rest. His yoke is easy because He carries the heavier end.
07-01.body_sw: Yesu huwaalika waliochoka: njoni kwangu, nami nitawapumzisha. Nira yake ni laini kwa sababu yeye hubeba upande mzito zaidi.

07-02.body_en: The Lord is my shepherd; He makes me lie down in green pastures. Sometimes rest is not weakness — it is obedience.
07-02.body_sw: Bwana ndiye mchungaji wangu; hunilaza katika malisho ya majani mabichi. Wakati mwingine kupumzika si udhaifu — ni utii.

07-03.body_en: God told Moses: My presence will go with you, and I will give you rest. Rest is not found in a place but in a Person.
07-03.body_sw: Mungu alimwambia Musa: Uso wangu utakwenda pamoja nawe, nami nitakupa raha. Pumziko halipatikani mahali bali katika Nafsi.

07-04.body_en: God rested on the seventh day and blessed it — not because He was tired, but because rest is holy. He built the rhythm; we ignore it at our cost.
07-04.body_sw: Mungu alipumzika siku ya saba na kuibariki — si kwa kuwa alichoka, bali kwa sababu pumziko ni takatifu. Aliweka mdundo huo; kuupuuza ni hasara yetu.

07-05.body_en: Jesus told His busy disciples: come aside to a deserted place and rest a while. Even ministry must pause to breathe.
07-05.body_sw: Yesu aliwaambia wanafunzi wake wenye shughuli nyingi: njoni ninyi peke yenu mahali pa faragha mkapumzike kidogo. Hata huduma sharti itue kupumua.

07-06.body_en: In returning and rest you shall be saved; in quietness and confidence shall be your strength. Hurry is not a fruit of the Spirit.
07-06.body_sw: Kwa kurudi na kustarehe mtaokolewa; nguvu zenu zitakuwa katika kutulia na kutumaini. Haraka si tunda la Roho.

07-07.body_en: It is vain to rise early and sit up late eating the bread of sorrows, for He gives His beloved sleep. Sleep is an act of trust — God runs the world while you rest.
07-07.body_sw: Ni bure kuamka mapema na kukesha usiku mkila mkate wa huzuni, maana huwapa wapenzi wake usingizi. Usingizi ni tendo la imani — Mungu huendesha ulimwengu wakati unapumzika.

07-08.body_en: There remains a rest for the people of God. The Sabbath is a weekly embassy of eternity — enter it gladly.
07-08.body_sw: Basi, imesalia raha ya sabato kwa watu wa Mungu. Sabato ni ubalozi wa milele wa kila juma — ingia ndani yake kwa furaha.

07-09.body_en: I will lie down in peace and sleep, for You alone, O Lord, make me dwell in safety. End each day by placing the night in His hands.
07-09.body_sw: Katika amani nitajilaza na kulala, maana wewe, Bwana, peke yako ndiwe unijaliaye kukaa salama. Maliza kila siku kwa kuuweka usiku mikononi mwake.

07-10.body_en: Do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about its own things. God gives grace in daily portions, like manna.
07-10.body_sw: Msisumbukie ya kesho, kwa kuwa kesho itajisumbukia yenyewe. Mungu hutoa neema kwa mafungu ya kila siku, kama mana.

07-11.body_en: David calmed and quieted his soul like a weaned child with its mother. Contentment is learned — practice it in God's lap today.
07-11.body_sw: Daudi alituliza na kunyamazisha nafsi yake kama mtoto aliyeachishwa pamoja na mama yake. Kuridhika hujifunzwa — kufanye leo mapajani mwa Mungu.

07-12.body_en: Paul learned contentment in plenty and in want through Christ who strengthened him. Contentment is not having everything but being held by Everything's Owner.
07-12.body_sw: Paulo alijifunza kuridhika katika kuwa na vingi na katika kupungukiwa kwa njia ya Kristo aliyemtia nguvu. Kuridhika si kuwa na kila kitu bali kushikwa na Mmiliki wa vyote.

07-13.body_en: Truly my soul silently waits for God; from Him comes my salvation. In a noisy world, silent trust is a loud testimony.
07-13.body_sw: Nafsi yangu inamngoja Mungu peke yake kwa kimya; wokovu wangu hutoka kwake. Katika ulimwengu wa kelele, imani ya kimya ni ushuhuda mkubwa.

07-14.body_en: The work of righteousness shall be peace, and its effect quietness and assurance forever. Peace is not the absence of trouble but the presence of righteousness.
07-14.body_sw: Kazi ya haki itakuwa amani, na mazao ya haki yatakuwa ni utulivu na matumaini daima. Amani si kutokuwepo kwa taabu bali kuwepo kwa haki.

07-15.body_en: Jesus left us His own peace — not as the world gives. The world's peace depends on circumstances; His peace survives them.
07-15.body_sw: Yesu alituachia amani yake mwenyewe — si kama ulimwengu utoavyo. Amani ya ulimwengu hutegemea mazingira; amani yake huyashinda.

07-16.title_en: The Secret Place of the Most High
07-16.title_sw: Mahali pa Siri pa Aliye Juu
07-16.body_en: Whoever dwells in the secret place of the Most High abides under the shadow of the Almighty. Make God your habitation, not just your emergency exit.
07-16.body_sw: Akaaye mahali pa siri pa Aliye juu atakaa katika uvuli wake Mwenyezi. Mfanye Mungu kuwa makao yako, si mlango wa dharura tu.

07-17.body_en: The Lord is good, a stronghold in the day of trouble, and He knows those who trust in Him. Being known by God is better than knowing what comes next.
07-17.body_sw: Bwana ni mwema, ni ngome siku ya taabu, naye huwajua hao wamkimbiliao. Kujulikana na Mungu ni bora kuliko kujua kitakachofuata.

07-18.body_en: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble; therefore we will not fear. His presence is never in the past tense.
07-18.body_sw: Mungu ndiye kimbilio letu na nguvu zetu, msaada utakaoonekana tele wakati wa mateso; kwa hiyo hatutaogopa. Uwepo wake hauko katika wakati uliopita kamwe.

07-19.body_en: Cast all your care upon Him, for He cares for you. The invitation is total — all your care, not just the manageable pieces.
07-19.body_sw: Mkimtwika yeye fadhaa zenu zote, kwa maana yeye hujishughulisha sana kwa mambo yenu. Mwaliko ni kamili — fadhaa zenu zote, si zile ndogo tu.

07-20.body_en: Rest in the Lord and wait patiently for Him; do not fret because of evildoers. Fretting changes nothing; trusting changes you.
07-20.body_sw: Ukae kimya mbele za Bwana, na kumngojea kwa saburi; usikasirike kwa sababu ya mtu afanikiwaye katika njia yake. Kuhangaika hakubadilishi kitu; kutumaini hukubadilisha wewe.

07-21.title_en: The Lord Will Fight for You
07-21.body_en: The Lord will fight for you, and you shall hold your peace. Some victories require your stillness more than your strength.
07-21.body_sw: Bwana atawapigania ninyi, nanyi mtanyamaza kimya. Ushindi mwingine huhitaji utulivu wako kuliko nguvu zako.

07-22.body_en: Return to your rest, O my soul, for the Lord has dealt bountifully with you. When your soul wanders into worry, preach it back home.
07-22.body_sw: Ee nafsi yangu, urudi rahani kwako, kwa kuwa Bwana amekutendea kwa ukarimu. Nafsi yako inapotanga-tanga katika wasiwasi, ihubirie irudi nyumbani.

07-23.body_en: Like a shepherd He gathers the lambs in His arms and gently leads those with young. God's pace accounts for your burdens.
07-23.body_sw: Kama mchungaji atawakusanya wana-kondoo mikononi mwake na kuwaongoza polepole wanaonyonyesha. Mwendo wa Mungu huzingatia mizigo yako.

07-24.body_en: Jesus rebuked the storm, and there was a great calm. The same voice that stilled the sea can quiet your heart today.
07-24.body_sw: Yesu aliikemea dhoruba, kukawa shwari kuu. Sauti ile ile iliyotuliza bahari yaweza kutuliza moyo wako leo.

07-25.body_en: In the multitude of my anxieties within me, Your comforts delight my soul. God's comfort is sized to match your anxiety — multitude for multitude.
07-25.body_sw: Katika wingi wa mawazo ya moyo wangu ndani yangu, faraja zako zaifurahisha roho yangu. Faraja ya Mungu ina kipimo cha kulingana na wasiwasi wako — wingi kwa wingi.

07-26.body_en: Now may the Lord of peace Himself give you peace always in every way. He does not outsource peace — He gives it Himself.
07-26.body_sw: Bwana wa amani mwenyewe awape amani sikuzote kwa njia zote. Hakabidhi amani kwa mwingine — huitoa yeye mwenyewe.

07-27.body_en: I lay down and slept; I awoke, for the Lord sustained me. Every morning you wake is proof He kept watch all night.
07-27.body_sw: Nalijilaza nikalala usingizi; naliamka, kwa kuwa Bwana ananitegemeza. Kila asubuhi unayoamka ni uthibitisho kwamba alikesha usiku kucha.

07-28.body_en: Trust in the Lord forever, for in the Lord is everlasting strength. Anchors hold because of what they grip — grip the Rock.
07-28.body_sw: Mtumainini Bwana milele, maana Bwana ndiye mwamba wa milele. Nanga hushika kwa sababu ya kile inachokishikilia — shika Mwamba.

07-29.body_en: Look at the birds: they do not sow or reap, yet your heavenly Father feeds them. You are of more value than many sparrows — He will not forget you.
07-29.body_sw: Waangalieni ndege wa angani: hawapandi wala hawavuni, na Baba yenu wa mbinguni huwalisha. Ninyi ni bora kupita shomoro wengi — hatawasahau.

07-30.body_en: I have set the Lord always before me; because He is at my right hand I shall not be moved. Stability is a matter of position — keep Him before you.
07-30.body_sw: Nimemweka Bwana mbele yangu daima; kwa kuwa yuko mkono wangu wa kuume sitaondoshwa. Uthabiti ni suala la mahali — mweke yeye mbele yako.

07-31.body_en: In the world you will have tribulation, but be of good cheer — I have overcome the world. Jesus promises peace inside the storm, not exemption from it.
07-31.body_sw: Ulimwenguni mnayo dhiki, lakini jipeni moyo — mimi nimeushinda ulimwengu. Yesu huahidi amani ndani ya dhoruba, si kinga dhidi yake.

08-01.body_en: Be strong in the Lord and in the power of His might; put on the whole armor of God. The battle is real, but so is the armory.
08-01.body_sw: Mwe hodari katika Bwana na katika uweza wa nguvu zake; vaeni silaha zote za Mungu. Vita ni kweli, lakini ghala la silaha pia ni kweli.

08-02.body_en: The Lord your God goes with you to fight for you against your enemies, to save you. You never enter a battle He has not already entered first.
08-02.body_sw: Bwana, Mungu wenu, ndiye anayekwenda pamoja nanyi kuwapigania juu ya adui zenu, ili kuwaokoa. Huingii vita ambavyo yeye hajaviingies kwanza.

08-03.body_en: The Lord is my light and my salvation — whom shall I fear? Fear shrinks when God is measured accurately.
08-03.body_sw: Bwana ni nuru yangu na wokovu wangu — nimwogope nani? Hofu hupungua Mungu anapopimwa kwa usahihi.

08-04.body_en: No weapon formed against you shall prosper. Weapons may be formed — the promise is they will not prevail.
08-04.body_sw: Kila silaha itakayofanyika juu yako haitafanikiwa. Silaha zaweza kufanyika — ahadi ni kwamba hazitashinda.

08-05.body_en: Do not be afraid of this great multitude, for the battle is not yours but God's. Your part is faith and obedience; the outcome is His department.
08-05.body_sw: Msiogope wala msifadhaike kwa ajili ya jeshi kubwa hili, kwani vita si vyenu bali ni vya Mungu. Sehemu yako ni imani na utii; matokeo ni idara yake.

08-06.body_en: The Lord is my rock, my fortress, my deliverer, my shield, my stronghold. David stacked up metaphors because one was not enough — God is all of them.
08-06.body_sw: Bwana ndiye jabali langu, na ngome yangu, na mwokozi wangu, na ngao yangu, na mnara wangu. Daudi alipanga mifano mingi kwa sababu mmoja haukutosha — Mungu ni yote hiyo.

08-07.title_en: No One Shall Stand Against You
08-07.body_en: As I was with Moses, so I will be with you; I will not leave you nor forsake you. God's presence is transferable across generations — including yours.
08-07.body_sw: Kama nilivyokuwa pamoja na Musa, ndivyo nitakavyokuwa pamoja nawe; sitakupungukia wala sitakuacha. Uwepo wa Mungu huvuka vizazi — pamoja na chako.

08-08.body_en: The Lord is my strength and my shield; my heart trusted in Him and I am helped. Notice the order: trust first, help follows.
08-08.body_sw: Bwana ni nguvu zangu na ngao yangu; moyo wangu umemtumaini, nami nimesaidiwa. Angalia mpangilio: tumaini kwanza, msaada hufuata.

08-09.body_en: Behold, God is my salvation; I will trust and not be afraid. Trust and fear are both choices — choose the one that has a promise.
08-09.body_sw: Tazama, Mungu ndiye wokovu wangu; nitatumaini wala sitaogopa. Kutumaini na kuogopa yote ni machaguo — chagua lile lenye ahadi.

08-10.body_en: My grace is sufficient for you, for My strength is made perfect in weakness. Your weak places are where God's power shows best.
08-10.body_sw: Neema yangu yakutosha, maana uweza wangu hutimilika katika udhaifu. Sehemu zako dhaifu ndipo nguvu ya Mungu huonekana vizuri zaidi.

08-11.body_en: In the day I cried out, You answered me, and made me bold with strength in my soul. Answered prayer breeds holy boldness.
08-11.body_sw: Siku ile niliyokuita uliniitikia, ukanifariji nafsi kwa kunitia nguvu. Maombi yaliyojibiwa huzaa ujasiri mtakatifu.

08-12.body_en: The three Hebrews trusted God to deliver them — but resolved to obey even if He did not. Faith worships before it sees the outcome.
08-12.body_sw: Waebrania watatu walimwamini Mungu kuwaokoa — lakini waliazimia kutii hata kama hangewaokoa. Imani huabudu kabla ya kuona matokeo.

08-13.body_en: Whenever I am afraid, I will trust in You. David did not deny fear; he decided what to do with it.
08-13.body_sw: Siku ya hofu yangu nitakutumaini wewe. Daudi hakukana hofu; aliamua la kufanya nayo.

08-14.body_en: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you; the rivers shall not overflow you. God does not always calm the flood, but He always enters it with you.
08-14.body_sw: Upitapo katika maji mengi nitakuwa pamoja nawe; katika mito, haitakugharikisha. Mungu hatulizi gharika kila mara, lakini daima huingia ndani yake pamoja nawe.

08-15.body_en: If God is for us, who can be against us? Count your opposition honestly — then count God, and recount.
08-15.body_sw: Mungu akiwapo upande wetu, ni nani aliye juu yetu? Hesabu wapinzani wako kwa uaminifu — kisha mhesabu Mungu, uhesabu upya.

08-16.body_en: Blessed be the Lord my Rock, who trains my hands for war. God does not just shelter His people; He strengthens them.
08-16.body_sw: Na ahimidiwe Bwana, mwamba wangu, anifundishaye mikono yangu vita. Mungu hawahifadhi watu wake tu; huwatia nguvu.

08-17.body_en: Do not sorrow, for the joy of the Lord is your strength. Joy is not a luxury for the believer — it is armor.
08-17.body_sw: Msihuzunike, kwa kuwa furaha ya Bwana ni nguvu zenu. Furaha si anasa kwa muumini — ni silaha.

08-18.body_en: When my heart is overwhelmed, lead me to the rock that is higher than I. Overwhelm is an invitation to climb higher than yourself.
08-18.body_sw: Moyo wangu ukizimia, uniongoze juu ya mwamba nisioweza kuupanda mimi. Kuzidiwa ni mwaliko wa kupanda juu kuliko nafsi yako.

08-19.body_en: The Lord God is my strength; He makes my feet like deer's feet on high places. God gives sure footing exactly where the terrain is most dangerous.
08-19.body_sw: Bwana Mungu ndiye nguvu zangu; huifanya miguu yangu kuwa kama ya kulungu mahali palipoinuka. Mungu hutoa hatua thabiti mahali ambapo ardhi ni hatari zaidi.

08-20.body_en: Watch, stand fast in the faith, be brave, be strong. Courage in Scripture is commanded — which means it is also enabled.
08-20.body_sw: Kesheni, simameni imara katika imani, fanyeni kiume, mkawe hodari. Ujasiri katika Maandiko umeamriwa — maana yake pia umewezeshwa.

08-21.title_en: God the Strength of My Heart
08-21.body_en: My flesh and my heart fail, but God is the strength of my heart and my portion forever. When your reserves run out, His are just beginning.
08-21.body_sw: Mwili wangu na moyo wangu hupunguka, bali Mungu ni nguvu za moyo wangu na sehemu yangu milele. Akiba zako zinapokwisha, zake ndipo zinaanza.

08-22.title_en: Though I Fall, I Will Arise
08-22.body_en: Do not rejoice over me, my enemy; when I fall, I will arise. Resilience is a fruit of faith — the story is not over.
08-22.body_sw: Usinifurahie, adui yangu; nijapoanguka, nitasimama tena. Ustahimilivu ni tunda la imani — hadithi haijaisha.

08-23.body_en: The Lord is my strength and song, and He has become my salvation. Israel sang on the far shore — your deliverance deserves a melody too.
08-23.body_sw: Bwana ni nguvu zangu na wimbo wangu, naye amekuwa wokovu wangu. Israeli waliimba ng'ambo ya bahari — ukombozi wako nao unastahili wimbo.

08-24.title_en: The Lord Is on My Side
08-24.body_en: The Lord is on my side; I will not fear. What can man do to me? Man's worst is temporary; God's best is eternal.
08-24.body_sw: Bwana yuko upande wangu; sitaogopa. Mwanadamu atanitenda nini? Baya zaidi la mwanadamu ni la muda; jema zaidi la Mungu ni la milele.

08-25.body_en: I, the Lord your God, will hold your right hand, saying to you: fear not, I will help you. God does not shout instructions from a distance — He holds on.
08-25.body_sw: Mimi, Bwana, Mungu wako, nitakushika mkono wako wa kuume, nikikuambia: usiogope, mimi nitakusaidia. Mungu hapigi kelele za maelekezo kwa mbali — hushika mkono.

08-26.body_en: When everyone deserted Paul, the Lord stood with him and strengthened him. Human support may fail; His attendance is guaranteed.
08-26.body_sw: Wote walipomwacha Paulo, Bwana alisimama pamoja naye akamtia nguvu. Msaada wa wanadamu waweza kukosekana; kuwepo kwake ni hakika.

08-27.body_en: The Lord will give strength to His people; the Lord will bless His people with peace. He gives both the muscle for the battle and the calm after it.
08-27.body_sw: Bwana atawapa watu wake nguvu; Bwana atawabariki watu wake kwa amani. Hutoa misuli kwa vita na utulivu baada yake.

08-28.body_en: The angel called fearful Gideon a mighty man of valor — before he had done anything brave. God names your potential, not your past.
08-28.body_sw: Malaika alimwita Gideoni mwenye hofu shujaa — kabla hajafanya jambo lolote la kishujaa. Mungu hutaja uwezo wako, si historia yako.

08-29.body_en: The God of Israel is He who gives strength and power to His people. Strength is His gift, not your achievement — receive it fresh today.
08-29.body_sw: Mungu wa Israeli ndiye awapaye watu wake nguvu na uwezo. Nguvu ni zawadi yake, si mafanikio yako — ipokee mpya leo.

08-30.body_en: The boldness of unschooled Peter and John was traced to one thing: they had been with Jesus. Time in His presence is the school of courage.
08-30.body_sw: Ujasiri wa Petro na Yohana wasiosoma ulionekana kutokana na jambo moja: walikuwa pamoja na Yesu. Muda mbele zake ni shule ya ujasiri.

08-31.body_en: Be of good courage, and He shall strengthen your heart, all you who hope in the Lord. Close this month braver than you began it.
08-31.body_sw: Uwe hodari, mtiwe nguvu mioyoni mwenu, ninyi nyote mnaomngoja Bwana. Funga mwezi huu ukiwa jasiri kuliko ulivyouanza.

09-01.body_en: You are the light of the world — let your light shine so others glorify your Father. A hidden lamp helps no one; shine where you are placed.
09-01.body_sw: Ninyi ni nuru ya ulimwengu — nuru yenu na iangaze ili wengine wamtukuze Baba yenu. Taa iliyofichwa haimsaidii mtu; angaza mahali ulipowekwa.

09-02.body_en: Go into all the world and preach the gospel to every creature. The commission is global, but it starts at your doorstep.
09-02.body_sw: Enendeni ulimwenguni mwote, mkaihubiri Injili kwa kila kiumbe. Agizo ni la ulimwengu wote, lakini huanzia mlangoni pako.

09-03.body_en: When Isaiah saw the Lord, his response was immediate: here am I, send me. Vision of God always leads to mission for God.
09-03.body_sw: Isaya alipomwona Bwana, jibu lake lilikuwa la papo hapo: mimi hapa, nitume mimi. Kumwona Mungu daima huelekeza katika utume wa Mungu.

09-04.title_sw: Kwa Mmoja wa Hawa Walio Wadogo
09-04.body_en: Whatever you did for one of the least of these, you did for Me. Jesus receives personally every kindness given in His name.
09-04.body_sw: Kadiri mlivyomtendea mmojawapo wa hao ndugu zangu walio wadogo, mlinitendea mimi. Yesu hupokea binafsi kila wema unaotolewa kwa jina lake.

09-05.body_en: Through love serve one another. Freedom in Christ is not freedom from service but freedom for it.
09-05.body_sw: Kwa upendo mtumikiane. Uhuru katika Kristo si uhuru wa kuacha kutumika bali ni uhuru wa kutumika.

09-06.body_en: If your Lord washed feet, no task is beneath you. Greatness in God's kingdom stoops.
09-06.body_sw: Ikiwa Bwana wako aliosha miguu, hakuna kazi iliyo chini ya hadhi yako. Ukuu katika ufalme wa Mungu huinama.

09-07.body_en: Remember the words of the Lord Jesus: it is more blessed to give than to receive. Generosity is not loss — it is the higher blessing.
09-07.body_sw: Kumbukeni maneno ya Bwana Yesu: ni heri kutoa kuliko kupokea. Ukarimu si hasara — ni baraka iliyo kuu zaidi.

09-08.body_en: Always be ready to give a reason for the hope in you, with meekness and fear. Your testimony needs no degree — only honesty and gentleness.
09-08.body_sw: Mwe tayari sikuzote kumjibu kila mtu awaulizaye habari za tumaini lililo ndani yenu, kwa upole na hofu. Ushuhuda wako hauhitaji shahada — bali unyofu na upole tu.

09-09.body_en: The harvest is plentiful but the laborers are few; pray the Lord of the harvest to send workers. Then be ready — such prayers often recruit the one praying.
09-09.body_sw: Mavuno ni mengi, lakini watenda kazi ni wachache; mwombeni Bwana wa mavuno apeleke watenda kazi. Kisha uwe tayari — maombi kama hayo mara nyingi humwajiri anayeomba.

09-10.body_en: I am not ashamed of the gospel, for it is the power of God to salvation. The gospel needs witnesses, not defenders — it carries its own power.
09-10.body_sw: Siionei haya Injili, kwa maana ni uweza wa Mungu uuletao wokovu. Injili huhitaji mashahidi, si watetezi — hubeba nguvu yake yenyewe.

09-11.body_en: We are ambassadors for Christ, as though God were pleading through us. You may be the only Bible someone reads today.
09-11.body_sw: Sisi tu wajumbe kwa ajili ya Kristo, kana kwamba Mungu anasihi kwa vinywa vyetu. Huenda ukawa Biblia pekee mtu atakayoisoma leo.

09-12.body_en: Go therefore and make disciples of all nations — and lo, I am with you always. The command comes wrapped in a promise of presence.
09-12.body_sw: Basi, enendeni, mkawafanye mataifa yote kuwa wanafunzi — na tazama, mimi nipo pamoja nanyi siku zote. Amri huja imefungwa katika ahadi ya uwepo.

09-13.body_en: The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life, and he who wins souls is wise. No investment outlasts a soul brought to Christ.
09-13.body_sw: Tunda la mwenye haki ni mti wa uzima, naye apataye nafsi za watu ni mwenye hekima. Hakuna uwekezaji unaodumu kuliko roho iliyoletwa kwa Kristo.

09-14.body_en: You shall be witnesses to Me in Jerusalem, Judea, Samaria, and to the end of the earth. Witness begins at home and widens in circles.
09-14.body_sw: Mtakuwa mashahidi wangu katika Yerusalemu, Uyahudi, Samaria, na hata mwisho wa nchi. Ushuhuda huanzia nyumbani na kupanuka kwa miduara.

09-15.body_en: There is joy in heaven over one sinner who repents. Heaven throws parties for what earth overlooks — never despise small beginnings.
09-15.body_sw: Kuna furaha mbinguni kwa ajili ya mwenye dhambi mmoja atubuye. Mbingu hufanya sherehe kwa kile ambacho dunia hukipuuza — usidharau mianzo midogo.

09-16.body_en: Faith by itself, without works, is dead. Your beliefs become believable when they become visible.
09-16.body_sw: Imani, isipokuwa ina matendo, imekufa nafsini mwake. Imani yako huaminika inapoonekana.

09-17.body_en: Bear one another's burdens, and so fulfill the law of Christ. Look around today — someone near you is carrying too much alone.
09-17.body_sw: Mchukuliane mizigo na kuitimiza hivyo sheria ya Kristo. Tazama pande zote leo — mtu aliye karibu nawe anabeba mzigo mkubwa peke yake.

09-18.title_en: Do Not Forget to Do Good
09-18.body_en: Do not forget to do good and to share, for with such sacrifices God is well pleased. Kindness is a liturgy God loves.
09-18.body_sw: Msisahau kutenda mema na kushirikiana; maana sadaka kama hizo ndizo zimpendezazo Mungu. Wema ni ibada ambayo Mungu huipenda.

09-19.body_en: Even a cup of cold water given in Jesus' name will not lose its reward. No act of love is too small for heaven's bookkeeping.
09-19.body_sw: Hata kikombe cha maji baridi kilichotolewa kwa jina la Yesu hakitakosa thawabu yake. Hakuna tendo la upendo dogo mno kwa hesabu za mbinguni.

09-20.body_en: If you extend your soul to the hungry, your light shall dawn in the darkness. Serving others is how God often heals the server.
09-20.body_sw: Ukimkunjulia mtu mwenye njaa nafsi yako, ndipo nuru yako itakapopambazuka gizani. Kuwahudumia wengine ndivyo Mungu mara nyingi humponya mhudumu.

09-21.body_en: Be steadfast, always abounding in the work of the Lord, knowing your labor is not in vain. God keeps records that eternity will publish.
09-21.body_sw: Mwimarike, sikuzote mkizidi sana katika kazi ya Bwana, mkijua ya kuwa taabu yenu si bure. Mungu hutunza kumbukumbu ambazo umilele utazichapisha.

09-22.body_en: Paul prayed that the sharing of faith would become effective by acknowledging every good thing in Christ. Faith grows in the telling of it.
09-22.body_sw: Paulo aliomba kwamba ushirika wa imani uwe na nguvu kwa kujua kila kitu chema kilicho ndani yetu katika Kristo. Imani hukua inaposhuhudiwa.

09-23.body_en: Those who turn many to righteousness will shine like the stars forever and ever. Soul-winners have the longest-lasting glory in the universe.
09-23.body_sw: Wale waongozao wengi kutenda haki watang'aa kama nyota milele na milele. Wavutao roho wana utukufu udumuo zaidi katika ulimwengu.

09-24.body_en: The Samaritan saw, had compassion, and acted. Compassion that does not cross the road is only sentiment.
09-24.body_sw: Msamaria aliona, akahurumia, akatenda. Huruma isiyovuka barabara ni hisia tu.

09-25.body_en: Whoever desires to be great must be a servant — even the Son of Man came to serve. In God's kingdom the ladder of greatness goes downward.
09-25.body_sw: Yeyote atakaye kuwa mkubwa lazima awe mtumishi — hata Mwana wa Adamu alikuja kutumika. Katika ufalme wa Mungu ngazi ya ukuu huelekea chini.

09-26.body_en: How shall they hear without a preacher? How beautiful are the feet of those who preach the gospel of peace. Someone once carried the good news to you — carry it on.
09-26.body_sw: Watasikiaje pasipo mhubiri? Ni mizuri kama nini miguu yao wahubirio habari njema ya amani. Mtu fulani aliwahi kukuletea habari njema — ipeleke mbele.

09-27.body_en: Cast your bread upon the waters, for you will find it after many days. Sow generously and patiently — God manages the returns.
09-27.body_sw: Tupa mkate wako juu ya maji, maana utauona baada ya siku nyingi. Panda kwa ukarimu na saburi — Mungu husimamia mavuno.

09-28.body_en: Lift up your eyes and look at the fields, for they are already white for harvest. Opportunity is not coming someday — it is ripe now.
09-28.body_sw: Inueni macho yenu myatazame mashamba, ya kuwa yamekwisha kuwa meupe, tayari kwa mavuno. Fursa haiji siku fulani — imeiva sasa.

09-29.body_en: Let no one despise your youth, but be an example in word, conduct, love, spirit, faith, purity. Influence is not measured in years but in faithfulness.
09-29.body_sw: Mtu awaye yote asiudharau ujana wako, bali uwe kielelezo kwa neno, mwenendo, upendo, roho, imani na usafi. Ushawishi haupimwi kwa miaka bali kwa uaminifu.

09-30.body_en: Walk in wisdom toward outsiders; let your speech always be with grace, seasoned with salt. Gracious words open doors that arguments cannot.
09-30.body_sw: Enendeni kwa hekima mbele yao walio nje; maneno yenu yawe na neema sikuzote, yakikolea chumvi. Maneno ya neema hufungua milango ambayo mabishano hayawezi.

10-01.body_en: Enter His gates with thanksgiving and His courts with praise. Gratitude is the doorway to God's presence — start this month at the gate.
