10-01.body_sw: Ingieni malangoni mwake kwa kushukuru, nyuani mwake kwa kusifu. Shukrani ni mlango wa uwepo wa Mungu — anza mwezi huu langoni.

10-02.body_en: In everything give thanks, for this is the will of God for you in Christ Jesus. Thanksgiving is commanded in everything, not for everything — He is good in it all.
10-02.body_sw: Shukuruni kwa kila jambo, maana hayo ni mapenzi ya Mungu kwenu katika Kristo Yesu. Shukrani imeamriwa katika kila jambo, si kwa kila jambo — yeye ni mwema ndani ya yote.

10-03.body_en: Bless the Lord, O my soul, and forget not all His benefits. Memory is the mother of gratitude — count yesterday's mercies today.
10-03.body_sw: Ee nafsi yangu, umhimidi Bwana, wala usizisahau fadhili zake zote. Kumbukumbu ni mama wa shukrani — hesabu rehema za jana leo.

10-04.body_en: I will bless the Lord at all times; His praise shall continually be in my mouth. David wrote this while fleeing for his life — praise is not weather-dependent.
10-04.body_sw: Nitamhimidi Bwana kila wakati; sifa zake zi kinywani mwangu daima. Daudi aliandika haya akikimbia kuokoa maisha yake — sifa haitegemei hali ya hewa.

10-05.body_en: Though the fig tree does not blossom, yet I will rejoice in the Lord. Faith praises God for who He is when it cannot see what He is doing.
10-05.body_sw: Ujapokuwa mtini hautachanua maua, hata hivyo nitamfurahia Bwana. Imani humsifu Mungu kwa jinsi alivyo hata isipoona anachokifanya.

10-06.title_en: Give Thanks, for He Is Good
10-06.body_en: Oh, give thanks to the Lord, for He is good, for His mercy endures forever. Goodness is not what God does occasionally — it is who He is eternally.
10-06.body_sw: Mshukuruni Bwana, kwa maana ni mwema, kwa maana fadhili zake ni za milele. Wema si kitu Mungu hufanya mara chache — ni jinsi alivyo milele.

10-07.body_en: Let the peace of God rule in your hearts — and be thankful. Paul mentions thankfulness three times in three verses; make it triple-strength today.
10-07.body_sw: Amani ya Mungu iamue mioyoni mwenu — tena iweni watu wa shukrani. Paulo hutaja shukrani mara tatu katika mistari mitatu; ifanye maradufu leo.

10-08.body_en: It is good to give thanks to the Lord — to declare His lovingkindness in the morning and His faithfulness every night. Bracket your day with praise.
10-08.body_sw: Ni vema kumshukuru Bwana — kuzitangaza rehema zako asubuhi, na uaminifu wako wakati wa usiku. Funga siku yako pande zote mbili kwa sifa.

10-09.body_en: Ten lepers were healed; one returned to give thanks. Do not let answered prayers go unthanked — be the one who comes back.
10-09.body_sw: Wakoma kumi walitakaswa; mmoja alirudi kushukuru. Usiache maombi yaliyojibiwa bila shukrani — uwe yule anayerudi.

10-10.body_en: Let everything that has breath praise the Lord. If you are breathing today, you are qualified — and invited.
10-10.body_sw: Kila mwenye pumzi na amsifu Bwana. Ikiwa unapumua leo, unastahili — na umealikwa.

10-11.body_en: From the fish's belly Jonah vowed the sacrifice of thanksgiving. Praise offered in the dark costs more — and means more.
10-11.body_sw: Kutoka tumbo la samaki Yona aliweka nadhiri ya dhabihu ya shukrani. Sifa itolewayo gizani hugharimu zaidi — na ina maana zaidi.

10-12.body_en: Sing to the Lord a new song; declare His glory among the nations. Fresh mercies deserve fresh music — do not recycle yesterday's praise.
10-12.body_sw: Mwimbieni Bwana wimbo mpya; wahubirini mataifa habari za utukufu wake. Rehema mpya zastahili wimbo mpya — usirudie sifa za jana tu.

10-13.body_en: At midnight Paul and Silas prayed and sang, and the prisoners heard them. Praise in prison preaches louder than sermons in comfort.
10-13.body_sw: Usiku wa manane Paulo na Sila walikuwa wakiomba na kuimba, na wafungwa waliwasikiliza. Sifa gerezani huhubiri kwa nguvu kuliko mahubiri ya starehe.

10-14.body_en: You have turned my mourning into dancing; You have put off my sackcloth and clothed me with gladness. God specializes in reversals — thank Him for the ones you have seen.
10-14.body_sw: Umenigeuzia maombolezo yangu kuwa machezo; umenivika furaha. Mungu ni hodari wa mageuzi — mshukuru kwa yale uliyokwisha yaona.

10-15.body_en: When you have eaten and are full, bless the Lord — beware lest you forget Him. Prosperity is a harder test than poverty; gratitude is the safeguard.
10-15.body_sw: Utakapokula na kushiba, umhimidi Bwana — jihadhari usije ukamsahau. Ufanisi ni mtihani mgumu kuliko umaskini; shukrani ndiyo kinga.

10-16.body_en: Oh come, let us sing to the Lord! Let us come before His presence with thanksgiving. Worship is a summons with joy written all over it.
10-16.body_sw: Njoni, tumwimbie Bwana! Tuje mbele zake kwa shukrani. Ibada ni wito uliojaa furaha kila upande.

10-17.body_en: Give thanks always for all things to God the Father in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Gratitude is not an event on the calendar but a posture of the heart.
10-17.body_sw: Mkimshukuru Mungu Baba sikuzote kwa mambo yote, katika jina lake Bwana wetu Yesu Kristo. Shukrani si tukio la kalenda bali mkao wa moyo.

10-18.body_en: What shall I render to the Lord for all His benefits toward me? The question itself is worship — live today as your answer.
10-18.body_sw: Nimlipe Bwana nini kwa ukarimu wake wote alionitendea? Swali lenyewe ni ibada — ishi leo kama jibu lako.

10-19.body_en: Oh, give thanks to the Lord, for He is good! For His mercy endures forever. Israel sang this bringing the ark home — sing it bringing your day to God.
10-19.body_sw: Mshukuruni Bwana kwa kuwa ni mwema; kwa maana fadhili zake ni za milele. Israeli waliimba haya wakileta sanduku nyumbani — yaimbe ukileta siku yako kwa Mungu.

10-20.body_en: The psalm begins with 'How long, O Lord?' and ends with singing. Honest lament that keeps trusting always finds its way to praise.
10-20.body_sw: Zaburi huanza na 'Hata lini, Ee Bwana?' na kumalizika kwa kuimba. Maombolezo ya kweli yanayoendelea kutumaini daima hufika kwenye sifa.

10-21.body_en: You are worthy, O Lord, to receive glory and honor and power, for You created all things. Heaven's constant song can start on earth — in your mouth today.
10-21.body_sw: Umestahili wewe, Bwana, kuupokea utukufu na heshima na uweza, kwa kuwa wewe ndiwe uliyeviumba vitu vyote. Wimbo wa daima wa mbinguni waweza kuanzia duniani — kinywani mwako leo.

10-22.body_en: My mouth shall praise You with joyful lips when I remember You on my bed. Let the last thoughts of your day be thanksgiving, not scrolling.
10-22.body_sw: Kinywa changu kitakusifu kwa midomo ya furaha ninapokukumbuka kitandani mwangu. Acha mawazo ya mwisho ya siku yako yawe shukrani, si kupitia habari.

10-23.body_en: Praise the Lord, call upon His name, declare His deeds among the peoples. Gratitude that stays private is only half grown — testify.
10-23.body_sw: Msifuni Bwana, liitieni jina lake, yatangazeni matendo yake kati ya mataifa. Shukrani ibakiayo faraghani imekua nusu tu — shuhudia.

10-24.body_en: God is holy, enthroned in the praises of Israel. Praise builds a throne room — worship makes space for the King.
10-24.body_sw: Mungu ni mtakatifu, umeketi juu ya sifa za Israeli. Sifa hujenga chumba cha enzi — ibada humtengenezea Mfalme nafasi.

10-25.body_en: Daniel blessed God who gives wisdom to the wise and reveals deep and secret things. When God answers, pause to praise before you proceed.
10-25.body_sw: Danieli alimhimidi Mungu awapaye hekima wenye hekima na kufunua mambo ya ndani na ya siri. Mungu ajibupo, tua kusifu kabla ya kuendelea.

10-26.body_en: Praise the Lord, for it is good to sing praises to our God; it is pleasant, and praise is beautiful. Praise fits the redeemed like a well-made garment.
10-26.body_sw: Msifuni Bwana, maana ni vema kumwimbia Mungu wetu; naam, kusifu ni kuzuri na kwapendeza. Sifa huwakaa waliokombolewa kama vazi lililoshonwa vyema.

10-27.body_en: Mary sang: my soul magnifies the Lord, and my spirit rejoices in God my Saviour. Magnifying God does not make Him bigger — it makes your view of Him truer.
10-27.body_sw: Mariamu aliimba: moyo wangu wamwadhimisha Bwana, na roho yangu inamfurahia Mungu, Mwokozi wangu. Kumwadhimisha Mungu hakumfanyi mkubwa zaidi — hufanya mtazamo wako kwake kuwa wa kweli zaidi.

10-28.body_en: I will hope continually, and will praise You yet more and more. Gratitude has no ceiling — there is always another mercy to name.
10-28.body_sw: Nitatumaini daima, nitakusifu, nikizidisha sifa zako zote. Shukrani haina dari — daima kuna rehema nyingine ya kuitaja.

10-29.body_en: Thanks be to God for His indescribable gift. When words run out, gratitude keeps going — Christ is a gift beyond vocabulary.
10-29.body_sw: Ashukuriwe Mungu kwa karama yake isiyoneneka. Maneno yakiisha, shukrani huendelea — Kristo ni zawadi ipitayo msamiati.

10-30.body_en: I will praise You, O Lord, with my whole heart; I will tell of all Your marvelous works. Halfhearted praise honors neither the giver nor the Gift.
10-30.body_sw: Nitakushukuru, Bwana, kwa moyo wangu wote; nitayasimulia matendo yako yote ya ajabu. Sifa ya nusu moyo haimheshimu mtoaji wala Zawadi.

10-31.title_en: Who Can Utter His Mighty Acts
10-31.body_en: Who can utter the mighty acts of the Lord, or declare all His praise? The inventory of God's goodness cannot be completed — but it is joy to try.
10-31.body_sw: Nani awezaye kuyanena matendo makuu ya Bwana, na kuzitangaza sifa zake zote? Orodha ya wema wa Mungu haiwezi kukamilika — lakini ni furaha kujaribu.

11-01.body_en: May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that you may abound in hope. Hope is not wishful thinking — it is confidence in a faithful God.
11-01.body_sw: Mungu wa tumaini na awajaze furaha yote na amani katika kuamini, mpate kuzidi sana kuwa na tumaini. Tumaini si ndoto za mchana — ni uhakika katika Mungu mwaminifu.

11-02.body_en: Hope is an anchor of the soul, sure and steadfast, entering behind the veil. Your anchor does not grip the seabed but the sanctuary — it cannot drag.
11-02.body_sw: Tumaini ni nanga ya roho, yenye salama, yenye nguvu, yaingiayo hata ndani ya pazia. Nanga yako haishiki mchanga wa bahari bali patakatifu — haiwezi kuburutwa.

11-03.body_en: Ah, Lord God! You made the heavens and the earth — there is nothing too hard for You. Measure your impossibilities against His track record.
11-03.body_sw: Ee Bwana MUNGU! Wewe umeumba mbingu na nchi — hakuna neno lililo gumu usiloliweza. Pima mambo yako yasiyowezekana kwa kumbukumbu ya matendo yake.

11-04.body_en: Tribulation produces perseverance, perseverance character, and character hope — and hope does not disappoint. God wastes nothing, not even your hardest seasons.
11-04.body_sw: Dhiki huleta saburi, na saburi hujenga tabia, na tabia huleta tumaini — na tumaini halitahayarishi. Mungu hapotezi kitu, hata majira yako magumu zaidi.

11-05.body_en: Why are you cast down, O my soul? Hope in God, for I shall yet praise Him. Sometimes faith means preaching to yourself instead of listening to yourself.
11-05.body_sw: Ee nafsi yangu, kwa nini kuinama? Umtumaini Mungu, maana nitakuja kumsifu tena. Wakati mwingine imani ni kujihubiria badala ya kujisikiliza.

11-06.body_en: He gives power to the weak, and to those who have no might He increases strength. Come to Him empty today — He gives from fullness.
11-06.body_sw: Huwapa nguvu wazimiao, humwongezea nguvu yeye asiyekuwa na uwezo. Mjie leo ukiwa mtupu — yeye hutoa kutoka katika ujazo.

11-07.body_en: The Lord is good to those who wait for Him, to the soul who seeks Him. Waiting on God is never wasted — it is where hope takes root.
11-07.body_sw: Bwana ni mwema kwa hao wamngojao, kwa nafsi imtafutayo. Kumngoja Mungu si kupoteza muda kamwe — ndipo tumaini hushika mizizi.

11-08.body_en: In his deepest loss Job declared: I know that my Redeemer lives. Faith's greatest statements are often made in life's darkest rooms.
11-08.body_sw: Katika hasara yake kuu Ayubu alitangaza: najua ya kuwa Mkombozi wangu yu hai. Kauli kuu za imani mara nyingi hutamkwa katika vyumba vya giza zaidi vya maisha.

11-09.body_en: Our light affliction, which is but for a moment, works for us a far more exceeding and eternal weight of glory. Eternity re-prices every present pain.
11-09.body_sw: Dhiki yetu nyepesi, iliyo ya muda wa kitambo tu, yatufanyia utukufu wa milele uzidio kuwa mwingi sana. Umilele hupanga upya bei ya kila maumivu ya sasa.

11-10.body_en: Weeping may endure for a night, but joy comes in the morning. Night has a curfew; God's joy has a sunrise.
11-10.body_sw: Huenda kilio huja kukaa usiku, lakini asubuhi huja furaha. Usiku una mwisho wake; furaha ya Mungu ina mapambazuko yake.

11-11.body_en: All things work together for good to those who love God. Not all things are good — but the Weaver makes them work together for good.
11-11.body_sw: Katika mambo yote Mungu hufanya kazi pamoja na wale wampendao katika kuwapatia mema. Si mambo yote ni mema — lakini Mfumaji huyafanya yafanye kazi pamoja kwa mema.

11-12.body_en: Count it all joy when you fall into various trials, knowing that the testing of your faith produces patience. Trials are God's gymnasium — endurance is built there.
11-12.body_sw: Hesabuni ya kuwa ni furaha tupu mkiangukia katika majaribu mbalimbali, mkifahamu ya kuwa kujaribiwa kwa imani yenu huleta saburi. Majaribu ni uwanja wa mazoezi wa Mungu — ustahimilivu hujengwa humo.

11-13.body_en: The Lord is near to those who have a broken heart. Heaven's throne room has a fast lane for the crushed in spirit.
11-13.body_sw: Bwana yu karibu nao waliovunjika moyo. Chumba cha enzi cha mbinguni kina njia ya haraka kwa waliopondeka roho.

11-14.body_en: God gives beauty for ashes, the oil of joy for mourning. Bring Him your ashes today — the exchange counter is open.
11-14.body_sw: Mungu hutoa taji ya maua badala ya majivu, mafuta ya furaha badala ya maombolezo. Mletee majivu yako leo — dirisha la kubadilishana liko wazi.

11-15.body_en: God will wipe away every tear; there shall be no more death, nor sorrow, nor crying. Every present grief has an expiration date.
11-15.body_sw: Mungu atafuta kila chozi; mauti haitakuwapo tena, wala maombolezo, wala kilio. Kila huzuni ya sasa ina tarehe ya kwisha.

11-16.body_en: Let us hold fast the confession of our hope without wavering, for He who promised is faithful. Your grip may weaken, but the Promiser never does.
11-16.body_sw: Na tulishike sana ungamo la tumaini letu, lisigeuke, maana yeye aliyeahidi ni mwaminifu. Mshiko wako waweza kudhoofika, lakini Mwenye ahadi hadhoofiki kamwe.

11-17.body_en: I would have lost heart unless I had believed that I would see the goodness of the Lord in the land of the living. Expect God's goodness this side of heaven too.
11-17.body_sw: Ningalikata tamaa isipokuwa naliamini ya kwamba nitauona wema wa Bwana katika nchi ya walio hai. Tarajia wema wa Mungu upande huu wa mbingu pia.

11-18.title_en: I Will Look to the Lord
11-18.body_en: Therefore I will look to the Lord; I will wait for the God of my salvation; my God will hear me. When everything shakes, fix your gaze — He will hear.
11-18.body_sw: Lakini mimi, nitamtazamia Bwana; nitamngoja Mungu wa wokovu wangu; Mungu wangu atanisikia. Kila kitu kitikisikapo, kaza macho yako — atasikia.

11-19.body_en: We are begotten again to a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ, to an inheritance incorruptible. Your inheritance is reserved in heaven — beyond theft, rust, and inflation.
11-19.body_sw: Tumezaliwa mara ya pili ili tupate tumaini lenye uzima kwa kufufuka kwake Yesu Kristo, tupate urithi usioharibika. Urithi wako umehifadhiwa mbinguni — mbali na wizi, kutu, na mfumuko wa bei.

11-20.body_en: In due season we shall reap if we do not lose heart. God's harvests have fixed dates that discouragement cannot see — keep sowing.
11-20.body_sw: Wakati wake utafika tutakapovuna tusipozimia roho. Mavuno ya Mungu yana tarehe maalum ambazo kukata tamaa hakuwezi kuziona — endelea kupanda.

11-21.body_en: Those who sow in tears shall reap in joy. Tears watering faithful seed are never wasted irrigation.
11-21.body_sw: Wapandao kwa machozi watavuna kwa kelele za furaha. Machozi yanayomwagilia mbegu ya uaminifu si umwagiliaji uliopotea kamwe.

11-22.body_en: The vision is yet for an appointed time; though it tarries, wait for it, because it will surely come. God's delays are appointments, not cancellations.
11-22.body_sw: Maono hayo ni kwa wakati ulioamriwa; yajapokawia, yangojee, kwa kuwa hakika yatakuja. Kuchelewa kwa Mungu ni miadi, si kufutwa.

11-23.body_en: Rejoice in hope, be patient in tribulation, continue steadfastly in prayer. Three commands, one lifestyle — hope, patience, prayer travel together.
11-23.body_sw: Furahini katika tumaini, subirini katika dhiki, dumuni katika kuomba. Amri tatu, mtindo mmoja wa maisha — tumaini, saburi, na maombi husafiri pamoja.

11-24.body_en: Do not remember the former things; behold, I will do a new thing. God's future for you is not a rerun of your past.
11-24.body_sw: Msiyakumbuke mambo ya kwanza; tazama, nitatenda neno jipya. Wakati ujao wa Mungu kwako si marudio ya yaliyopita.

11-25.body_en: And now, Lord, what do I wait for? My hope is in You. Strip away every lesser expectation until only He remains — that hope holds.
11-25.body_sw: Na sasa, Bwana, nategemea nini? Tumaini langu ni kwako. Ondoa kila tarajio dogo hadi yeye tu abaki — tumaini hilo hushika.

11-26.body_en: Remember that the Lord your God led you all the way these forty years in the wilderness. Reviewing God's faithfulness behind you builds hope for what is ahead.
11-26.body_sw: Utaikumbuka njia ile yote Bwana, Mungu wako, aliyokuongoza miaka hii arobaini nyikani. Kupitia uaminifu wa Mungu nyuma yako hujenga tumaini kwa yaliyo mbele.

11-27.body_en: At that time I will bring you back — I will make you a name and a praise among all peoples. God writes homecoming into the end of His people's story.
11-27.body_sw: Wakati ule nitawaleta tena — nitawafanya kuwa jina na sifa kati ya mataifa yote. Mungu huandika kurudi nyumbani mwishoni mwa hadithi ya watu wake.

11-28.body_en: The eye of the Lord is on those who hope in His mercy. While you wait for Him, He is watching over you — the waiting is mutual attention.
11-28.body_sw: Jicho la Bwana li kwao wamchao, wazingojeao fadhili zake. Unapomngoja, yeye anakuangalia — kungoja ni kuangaliana.

11-29.title_en: Let Not Your Heart Be Troubled
11-29.body_en: I go to prepare a place for you, and I will come again and receive you to Myself. The Carpenter of Nazareth is building your forever home.
11-29.body_sw: Naenda kuwaandalia mahali, nami nitakuja tena niwakaribishe kwangu. Seremala wa Nazareti anajenga makao yako ya milele.

11-30.body_en: I wait for the Lord more than those who watch for the morning. The watchman's dawn always comes — and so does the Lord's answer.
11-30.body_sw: Nafsi yangu inamngoja Bwana kuliko walinzi waingojao asubuhi. Mapambazuko ya mlinzi huja daima — na jibu la Bwana pia.

12-01.body_en: We look for the blessed hope and glorious appearing of our great God and Saviour Jesus Christ. Advent is not only a memory — it is an appointment.
12-01.body_sw: Tukilitazamia tumaini lenye baraka na mafunuo ya utukufu wa Mungu mkuu na Mwokozi wetu Yesu Kristo. Ujio si kumbukumbu tu — ni miadi.

12-02.body_en: The virgin shall conceive and bear a Son, and shall call His name Immanuel — God with us. The whole gospel is in that one name: God did not stay distant.
12-02.body_sw: Bikira atachukua mimba, atazaa mtoto mwanamume, naye atamwita jina lake Imanueli — Mungu pamoja nasi. Injili yote imo katika jina hilo moja: Mungu hakubaki mbali.

12-03.body_en: Out of little Bethlehem came the Ruler whose goings forth are from everlasting. God delights to bring the eternal out of the unnoticed.
12-03.body_sw: Kutoka Bethlehemu ndogo alitoka Mtawala ambaye matokeo yake yamekuwa tangu zamani za milele. Mungu hufurahia kutoa cha milele kutoka kisichoonekana.

12-04.body_en: The angel announced good tidings of great joy for all people: a Saviour is born. Christmas is heaven's news bulletin — and it is still good news.
12-04.body_sw: Malaika alitangaza habari njema ya furaha kuu kwa watu wote: Mwokozi amezaliwa. Kuzaliwa kwa Yesu ni tangazo la habari la mbinguni — na bado ni habari njema.

12-05.body_en: The Word became flesh and dwelt among us, and we beheld His glory. God translated Himself into a language every human can read: a life.
12-05.body_sw: Neno alifanyika mwili, akakaa kwetu, nasi tukauona utukufu wake. Mungu alijitafsiri katika lugha kila mwanadamu awezayo kusoma: maisha.

12-06.title_en: Unto Us a Child Is Born
12-06.body_en: Unto us a Child is born — Wonderful, Counsellor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace. Every title answers a human need; every need finds its answer in Him.
12-06.body_sw: Maana kwa ajili yetu mtoto amezaliwa — Mshauri wa ajabu, Mungu mwenye nguvu, Baba wa milele, Mfalme wa amani. Kila cheo hujibu hitaji la mwanadamu; kila hitaji hupata jibu lake ndani yake.

12-07.body_en: You shall call His name Jesus, for He will save His people from their sins. His name is His mission — salvation was the plan from the first breath.
12-07.body_sw: Utamwita jina lake Yesu, maana yeye ndiye atakayewaokoa watu wake na dhambi zao. Jina lake ni utume wake — wokovu ulikuwa mpango tangu pumzi ya kwanza.

12-08.body_en: When the fullness of the time had come, God sent forth His Son. Heaven's clock never runs late — not for Bethlehem, and not for your prayers.
12-08.body_sw: Ulipowadia utimilifu wa wakati, Mungu alimtuma Mwanawe. Saa ya mbinguni haichelewi kamwe — si kwa Bethlehemu, wala si kwa maombi yako.

12-09.body_en: For with God nothing will be impossible. The angel said it to Mary about a miracle — the words still apply to yours.
12-09.body_sw: Kwa kuwa hakuna neno lisilowezekana kwa Mungu. Malaika alimwambia Mariamu kuhusu muujiza — maneno hayo bado yanahusu wako.

12-10.body_en: The wise men rejoiced, fell down, and worshiped, opening their treasures. Wisdom still travels any distance to kneel before Jesus.
12-10.body_sw: Mamajusi walifurahia furaha kubwa mno, wakaanguka wakamsujudia, wakafungua hazina zao. Hekima bado husafiri umbali wowote kupiga magoti mbele za Yesu.

12-11.body_en: The God of heaven will set up a kingdom which shall never be destroyed. Empires rise and fall on schedule — His kingdom has no expiry.
12-11.body_sw: Mungu wa mbinguni atausimamisha ufalme usioharibika milele. Falme huinuka na kuanguka kwa ratiba — ufalme wake hauna mwisho.

12-12.title_en: The Gospel to All the World
12-12.body_en: This gospel of the kingdom will be preached in all the world as a witness, and then the end will come. Every act of witness moves the clock of history.
12-12.body_sw: Habari njema ya ufalme itahubiriwa katika ulimwengu wote, kuwa ushuhuda kwa mataifa yote; hapo ndipo ule mwisho utakapokuja. Kila tendo la ushuhuda husogeza saa ya historia.

12-13.body_en: Behold, I am coming quickly, and My reward is with Me. The last chapters of the Bible pulse with urgency — live ready.
12-13.body_sw: Tazama, naja upesi, na ujira wangu u pamoja nami. Sura za mwisho za Biblia zinadunda kwa uharaka — ishi ukiwa tayari.

12-14.body_en: Watch therefore, for you do not know what hour your Lord is coming. Readiness is not panic — it is a lamp kept burning.
12-14.body_sw: Kesheni basi, kwa maana hamjui ni siku ipi atakayokuja Bwana wenu. Kuwa tayari si hofu — ni taa inayoendelea kuwaka.

12-15.body_en: The Lord Himself will descend from heaven with a shout, and the dead in Christ will rise. The reunion of all reunions is on heaven's calendar.
12-15.body_sw: Bwana mwenyewe atashuka kutoka mbinguni pamoja na mwaliko, nao waliokufa katika Kristo watafufuliwa. Mkutano wa mikutano yote umo katika kalenda ya mbinguni.

12-16.body_en: If I go and prepare a place for you, I will come again. His return is as certain as His departure — He keeps His word.
12-16.body_sw: Nikienda na kuwaandalia mahali, nitakuja tena. Kurudi kwake ni hakika kama kuondoka kwake — hushika neno lake.

12-17.body_en: This same Jesus will so come in like manner as you saw Him go into heaven. Not a different Christ, not a symbol — the same Jesus, visibly returning.
12-17.body_sw: Huyu Yesu atakuja jinsi iyo hiyo mlivyomwona akienda zake mbinguni. Si Kristo mwingine, si ishara — Yesu yule yule, akirudi kwa kuonekana.

12-18.body_en: Behold, He is coming with clouds, and every eye will see Him. His return will be the most public event in history — no one will miss it.
12-18.body_sw: Tazama, yuaja na mawingu, na kila jicho litamwona. Kurudi kwake kutakuwa tukio la wazi zaidi katika historia — hakuna atakayelikosa.

12-19.body_en: The Lord is not slack concerning His promise, but is longsuffering, not willing that any should perish. The delay you wonder about is mercy for someone still coming.
12-19.body_sw: Bwana hakawii kuitimiza ahadi yake, bali huvumilia, maana hapendi mtu yeyote apotee. Kuchelewa unakokustaajabia ni rehema kwa mtu ambaye bado anakuja.

12-20.body_en: When these things begin to happen, look up and lift up your heads, because your redemption draws near. World news that frightens others should raise the believer's gaze.
12-20.body_sw: Mambo hayo yaanzapo kutokea, changamkeni, mkaviinue vichwa vyenu, kwa kuwa ukombozi wenu umekaribia. Habari za dunia zinazowatisha wengine zapaswa kuinua macho ya muumini.

12-21.body_en: It will be said in that day: behold, this is our God; we have waited for Him and He will save us. Rehearse now the sentence you will say then.
12-21.body_sw: Katika siku hiyo itanenwa: tazama, huyu ndiye Mungu wetu; tumemngoja naye atatuokoa. Fanya mazoezi sasa ya sentensi utakayosema siku ile.

12-22.body_en: To you who fear My name the Sun of Righteousness shall arise with healing in His wings. History's darkest hour precedes its brightest dawn.
12-22.body_sw: Kwenu ninyi mnaolicha jina langu, jua la haki litawazukia, lenye kuponya katika mbawa zake. Saa ya giza zaidi ya historia hutangulia mapambazuko yake angavu zaidi.

12-23.body_en: Behold, I am coming quickly! Hold fast what you have, that no one may take your crown. Perseverance now is coronation later.
12-23.body_sw: Tazama, naja upesi! Shika sana ulicho nacho, asije mtu akaitwaa taji yako. Ustahimilivu wa sasa ni kutawazwa baadaye.

12-24.title_en: Glory to God in the Highest
12-24.body_en: Suddenly a multitude of the heavenly host praised God: glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace. The first Christmas concert had an angel choir — join the song tonight.
12-24.body_sw: Ghafula palikuwa na jeshi la mbinguni likimsifu Mungu: utukufu kwa Mungu juu mbinguni, na duniani amani. Tamasha la kwanza la kuzaliwa kwake lilikuwa na kwaya ya malaika — jiunge na wimbo usiku huu.

12-25.body_en: She laid Him in a manger, because there was no room for them in the inn. The question of Bethlehem is still today's question: is there room for Him in your life?
12-25.body_sw: Akamlaza horini, kwa sababu hawakupata nafasi katika nyumba ya wageni. Swali la Bethlehemu bado ni swali la leo: yupo nafasi kwa ajili yake maishani mwako?

12-26.body_en: God has highly exalted Him and given Him the name above every name. The manger led to a cross, and the cross to a throne — every knee will bow.
12-26.body_sw: Mungu alimwadhimisha mno, akamkirimia Jina lile lipitalo kila jina. Hori iliongoza msalabani, na msalaba katika kiti cha enzi — kila goti litapigwa.

12-27.body_en: I saw a new heaven and a new earth — and God Himself will be with them and be their God. The Bible ends where Eden began: God at home with humanity.
12-27.body_sw: Nikaona mbingu mpya na nchi mpya — na Mungu mwenyewe atakuwa pamoja nao na kuwa Mungu wao. Biblia inaishia pale Edeni ilipoanzia: Mungu akikaa na wanadamu.

12-28.body_en: He who testifies to these things says: surely I am coming quickly. Amen. Even so, come, Lord Jesus! The Bible's last prayer can be your daily one.
12-28.body_sw: Yeye mwenye kuyashuhudia haya asema: naam, naja upesi. Amina. Na uje, Bwana Yesu! Ombi la mwisho la Biblia laweza kuwa lako la kila siku.

12-29.title_en: Our Dwelling Place in All Generations
12-29.body_en: Lord, You have been our dwelling place in all generations — from everlasting to everlasting, You are God. As the year closes, remember: times change, God does not.
12-29.body_sw: Bwana, wewe umekuwa makao yetu vizazi vyote — tangu milele hata milele wewe ndiwe Mungu. Mwaka unapofungwa, kumbuka: nyakati hubadilika, Mungu habadiliki.

12-30.title_en: Ebenezer — Thus Far the Lord Has Helped
12-30.body_en: Samuel set up a stone and called it Ebenezer: thus far the Lord has helped us. Look back over this year and set up your own stone of remembrance.
12-30.body_sw: Samweli akasimamisha jiwe akaliita jina lake Ebenezeri, akisema: hata hapa Bwana ametusaidia. Tazama nyuma mwaka huu na usimamishe jiwe lako la ukumbusho.

12-31.body_en: You crown the year with Your goodness, and Your paths drip with abundance. Close the year counting crowns, not losses — His goodness framed every month.
12-31.body_sw: Umeuvika mwaka taji ya wema wako, na mapito yako yadondoza unono. Funga mwaka ukihesabu taji, si hasara — wema wake uliuzunguka kila mwezi.
